name: Gary Peters
subject: this couldn't have come at a worse time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
With analysts at CBS News reporting that Michigan's Senate race will decide Senate control, we'll have zero chance of taking back the Senate if we lose this seat.
There's no way of sugarcoating this, everyone: I was the only Democratic senator to be outraised this summer -- and our Trump- and DeVos-backed opponent has outraised us four out of the last five quarters. And, it couldn't have come at a worse time, with a **new poll showing me nearly two points BEHIND my far-right opponent.**
**With analysts at CBS News reporting that Michigan 's Senate race will decide Senate control, we'll have zero chance of taking back the Senate if we lose this seat.** It's why right-wing interests from Donald Trump to Mitch McConnell to the DeVos family are funneling in over $30 million to buy this Senate seat.
I'm no stranger to tough fights: Fighting for the people of Michigan is the greatest honor of my life, and I do not plan on ceding this seat to a right-wing extremist.
But if we're going to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats, we CANNOT afford to take anything for granted. And with less than TWO WEEKS until Election Day and over a million Michiganders already casting their ballots, we're running out of time to make up ground.
Our opponent has the full force of GOP special interests behind him -- but I have you. **So I'm asking:[Before midnight, can I count on you to contribute $3 or more -- every dollar you can spare -- to win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6ff/2a380d31/207e96c4/f04b17/3016049656/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Z3AiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyMV9NV0g0UGV0ZXJzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4gp?refcode=e20201021_MWH4Peters_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Maggie Hassan and Gary Peters._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6ff/2a380d31/207e96c4/f04b10/3016049656/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Z3AiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyMV9NV0g0UGV0ZXJzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4gp?refcode=e20201021_MWH4Peters_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6ff/2a380d31/207e96c4/f04b11/3016049656/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Z3AiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyMV9NV0g0UGV0ZXJzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRaUI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4gp?refcode=e20201021_MWH4Peters_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6ff/2a380d31/207e96c4/f04b12/3016049656/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Z3AiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyMV9NV0g0UGV0ZXJzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVReUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4gp?refcode=e20201021_MWH4Peters_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6ff/2a380d31/207e96c4/f04b17/3016049656/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Z3AiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAyMV9NV0g0UGV0ZXJzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4gp?refcode=e20201021_MWH4Peters_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
In a race this close, fundraising is an important way campaigns can show their strength -- and right now, we need to show the GOP that we won't lose this election by hitting our fundraising goals and not backing down an inch until polls close on Election Day.
Thanks for fighting by my side for working families in Michigan and across the country.
Gary

name: Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
This election will come down to the very last donation. | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=06d88be53e7e44b7862d4f65879f1d3b&_e=ubvMFQaXtwO6aOWkqo8PHu-3OVpvQH5LREHHeJwVSGoLlYz0OJrTKO41i6ie0NOwnTq-BIMUi4Q5Xf1qkXsG_Tx-vPt1koeprTvc4fUUxA9o7ruHOcy9HPZItT3Uxs4wLoXn_R3ME-NAxQBugyuCgSeTm_CcVch54R_xugpkCAjn4aia6AIXQV5eamvMfArn0YFHO3XQCXej_hFDxKDwXjH2M280Y9b1RFIC_wL62fBw7fucgD7ExDlO2aPq5KqPQy_hXONPCJHQ_E7gyZR3jpOG2iC2X3aGlLQXGHb4FgjnOUkywTfzYVXy7EtUwiCiYam4pOonmG_C-ou9W3CWqx69bt-n735C5gFCgwRnJtjDvjGM7PGPCA0XqveTtgcyJkLQOXZ4z7GdsXAII7YXlqGO0FZQ2_6zxHo83NorXem5io3uISwaQzAxKWgtzg0o)
---
Friend,

Democrats are all-in to defeat us. They are dumping historic amounts of money - HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS - into red states in order to flip the Senate majority. **Wow**.

There’s one thing I know: Senator Steve Daines and I will never stop fighting for you and our conservative values. name: Doug Jones
subject: We're in the lead in Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
My friend Jacky said I should reach out today with an update on our race in Alabama.
We've known all along that once Alabama voters saw the truth about my record of getting things done for them -- and saw through Tommy Tuberville's false ads and complete lack of experience -- that we could win this race. Thanks to supporters like you, we have been getting the truth out.
It's clear voters are responding -- the latest polls show us vaulting into the lead. Let's keep it up:
**[I need your help to keep this Alabama Senate seat blue. Will you split a $5 contribution to my campaign and Jacky Rosen right now to join the fight?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201021-doug-jones?refcode=em201021i_4685&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
In 2017, we proved the Washington pundits wrong and showed the nation that unity and hope can win when we flipped Alabama's Senate seat. In 2020, we're going to prove it once again.
We're leading Tuberville in the polls, but we've got to keep up this momentum until the election.
**[Pitch in $5 to my campaign and Jacky Rosen now to expand our lead in Alabama.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201021-doug-jones?refcode=em201021i_4685&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Doug Jones

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201021-doug-jones?refcode=em201021i_4685&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d84b4/4fbb2af3/20f755c7/5e81bd0f/2848068219/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

On stage I advocated for Iowa’s farmers, families, and the unborn, as well as fiscal responsibility, the taxpayer, and effective government just to name a few. These are all values I hold and priorities I’ll take with me to Congress, but in addition to that, I spoke out – and will continue to speak out – against the irresponsible, reckless agenda of the Green New Deal, an extreme environmental plan that JD Scholten supports.

We secured a victory today, but this race isn’t over yet – my opponent is still seeing money pour in from liberal activists across the country, and it’s being used to drown out our message. name: Steve Chabot Press
subject: CHABOT IN NEW AD: “WHILE MY OPPONENT’S BEEN LYING, I’VE BEEN WORKING”
body:
Campaign’s Latest Television Ad Shares the Truth About Kate Schroder’s Lies and Highlights Steve Chabot’s Record of Results Delivering for OH-01 Small
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jujjtjdd-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujjtjdd-kujkulhluu-r/) **CHABOT IN NEW AD: "WHILE MY OPPONENT'S BEEN LYING, I'VE BEEN WORKING"**_Campaign 's Latest Television Ad Shares the Truth About Kate Schroder's Lies and Highlights Steve Chabot's Record of Results Delivering for OH-01 Small Businesses and Families_ **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** October 21, 2020Contact: Jon ConradiEmail: [jconradi@fp1strategies.com](mailto:jconradi@fp1strategies.com)CINCINNATI -- Chabot for Congress released a new television ad on Wednesday that shares the truth about Kate Schroder's dishonest attacks and highlights Congressman Chabot's record of delivering results for the First District through the pandemic."While Kate Schroder has based her entire campaign on blatant lies, Steve Chabot has been fighting tirelessly to deliver results for the hardworking people of the First District," said Chabot for Congress spokesman Jon Conradi. "While Schroder was lying, Steve Chabot was working, helping to craft the Paycheck Protection Program and then delivering more small business relief for the First District than was secured by any other district in Ohio.""Congressman Chabot's relentless fight to support small businesses through the pandemic resulted in $3 billion in PPP aid for Cincinnati, Hamilton County and Warren County which helped save more than 250,000 jobs," Conradi continued. "Congressman Chabot will never stop fighting for First District families, small businesses and communities."Watch the web ad, "Truth," [HERE](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujjtjdd-kujkulhluu-y/). **STEVE CHABOT FIGHTING FOR OH-01 DURING PANDEMIC****COVID-19 Relief Packages** When the pandemic hit, Congressman Chabot worked across party lines, to mobilize the nation against the spread and economic impact of COVID-19, sponsoring bipartisan legislation to better prepare the nation to deal with outbreaks, calling on the president to invoke the Defense Production Act to ensure America's health care workers have the safety equipment they need, working with medical experts to keep the public informed -- and securing critical relief for small businesses and helping to save the jobs they support.Congressman Chabot also supported bipartisan legislation passed in the House to respond to the virus and provide economic support to Americans including:
* **Phase 1:** $8.3 billion emergency funding bill designed to treat and prevent the spread of the virus.
* **Phase 2:** Families First Coronavirus Response Act that provided paid sick leave, tax credits, and free COVID-19 testing while expanding food assistance and unemployment benefits, and increased Medicaid funding.
* **Phase 3:** Bipartisan CARES Act providing $100 billion in emergency relief for nurses, doctors and first responders and stimulus checks directly to Americans, creating a fund for small business Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) loans, expanding unemployment benefits, and helping larger companies retain employees.
* **Phase 3.5:** Replenishing small business PPP funding and providing $75 billion for hospitals and healthcare workers and $25 billion for research and expanded testing.

**Paycheck Protection Program (PPP)** The pandemic has placed unprecedented challenges on the small businesses who form the heartbeat of so many of our communities. That is why Congressman Chabot used his position as the Ranking Member of the Small Business Committee to help craft the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) and then helped to secure [more of that small business support for the First District](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujjtjdd-kujkulhluu-j/) than was received by any other district in Ohio.The support that Congressman Chabot was able to secure was no accident, it took experience, relationships and ability to work across party lines to get the job done. In total, the PPP small business support Chabot helped secure for the First District resulted in:
* 256,192: More than 250,000 jobs being saved in our communities.
* 17,652: More than 17,000 small businesses receiving federal assistance during the pandemic.
* $2,905,091,675: Nearly three billion dollars' worth of small business support for this district.

Now, Congressman Chabot is [leading](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujjtjdd-kujkulhluu-t/) an effort to stop Nancy Pelosi from continuing to block additional support and relief from going to our small businesses who need it to survive. ### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujjtjdd-kujkulhluu-i/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujjtjdd-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujjtjdd-kujkulhluu-h/)

Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Tonight, I went head to head against Ben Ray Lujan’s DC partisan, political playbook and our New Mexico values campaign won the day! It was an honor to fight for our New Mexico values live on TV, and I can’t wait to keep fighting for you everyday in the Senate. If you can, | | | Ben Ray Lujan thought he could recite DNC talking points about how Republicans are evil, but that’s not going to work in this race and it didn’t work in tonight’s debate. New Mexicans know that I am fighting for them and that I will do everything I can, even working across the aisle, to help build a safer, more prosperous New Mexico. | | | Thank you so much for your support, Mark P.S. Tonight our New Mexico values campaign defeated Ben Ray Lujan’s DC partisan political playbook. He thought he could win by reciting DNC talking points about how Republicans are evil, but the people of New Mexico know me and my campaign. They know that I will work across the aisle to bring real change to our state. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

name: Steve Chabot
subject: 2 Weeks to Go!
body:
2 Weeks to Go! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [2 Weeks to Go!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-j/)
It's hard to believe that the much-anticipated 2020 election is almost upon us. And in some ways, it actually already is, as many people in our state and across the country have already voted by absentee ballot, or by early-voting at the local board of elections. In this week's blog, I will give you my best prediction as to what will happen and who will be victorious. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Green New Disaster](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-d/)
My opponent, Kate Schroder, and I met for two debates last week. I hate to use the word "lie" when talking about another person, but that's exactly what Ms. Schroder did a number of times during both debates. In this week's blog, I discuss these lies and one particular one that will get your blood boiling. She supports AOC's Green New Deal, which could cost our country $93 trillion, or your household approximately $600,000! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Debates and More Debates](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-u/)
Well, it's that time of the campaign cycle - time for debates. In this week's blog post I discuss my thoughts on last week's Trump-Biden debate and clue you into a series of local debates, with yours truly, that you will not want to miss! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Stark Choice: Support the Police, or Undermine Them](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-n/)
As you can imagine, there are a lot of differences between myself and my opponent on the issues. However, none are as stark as my record of supporting the police, and my opponent Kate Schroder's record of undermining them. That is why this past Monday, I received the endorsement of both Dan Hils, President of the Cincinnati FOP, and Hamilton County Sheriff Jim Neil, who was elected Sheriff twice as a Democrat. In this week's blog, I discuss why now, more than ever, we need to support our police and first responders. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jujyuhjk-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: Defeat AOC
subject: The 1 Seat Americans must Flip
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CUMMINGS
body:
The 1 Seat Americans must Flip

Peter,
Can you think of four more scary
words than Senator Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez? Well…if you
don't help me RIGHT NOW, it won't be long until Congresswoman AOC
becomes Senator AOC!
My name is John Cummings and I'm
the Republican nominee running against AOC, and seeking to return
her to private life. Unlike AOC, I love America.
I'm a former NYPD cop and
public-school teacher who is running for Congress to improve the
lives of Americans, especially in my community, and not to feed
my own personal political ego.
Even President Trump has
predicted AOC will challenge…and DEFEAT…Chuck
Schumer in the 2022 Election! The prospect of removing Chuck
Schumer from the Senate is appealing, but if you think Chuck
Schumer is bad, just imagine what Senator AOC would look like!
For the sake of our nation, will
you help me retire AOC in less than 3 weeks by making a
contribution today of $250, $100, $50, $25, or whatever you can
afford?
AOC's vision of our great nation
is worse than Hillary Clinton's. It is worse than Barack Obama's
and unless we defeat her NOW, there's no stopping her.
You must look at this time in our
history, like the 2006 Democrat Convention, where Barack Obama's
speech propelled him to the White House. You and I have the
chance to stop AOC skyrocketing political career-we cannot delay.
While "The Squad" may be jubilant
at this future prospect, this would be an absolute disaster for
you, me, and most importantly…for America. Imagine our
great nation with Senator AOC legislation like:

The job-killing "New Green
Deal;"
Defunding America's law
enforcement;
Repealing the Second
Amendment;
Alienating Israel, one of
America's greatest allies, and
Influencing a possible
President Biden EVEN FURTHER TO THE LEFT

That's why I'm turning to YOU, as
a freedom-loving, patriotic American.
Right now, AOC is running for
re-election to the U.S. House. She has raised millions of dollars
for her current reelection campaign… over $12,000,000
since she took office!
At cocktail parties from
Manhattan to San Francisco, these liberal elites have opened up
their wallets to ensure AOC is re-elected and does what Nancy
Pelosi has failed to provide them.
Make no mistake-AOC looks at the
U.S. House as merely a steppingstone to higher office and that's
why we need to end her political career next month.

DEFEAT
AOC

I can't match AOC's fundraising
dollar for dollar, but I have something she will never have-YOU
and other freedom-loving Americans who reject AOC's warped vision
of America. Together, if we stand up and fight for freedom, we
will win!
Will you help me DEFEAT AOC and
her radical, socialist agenda by making a contribution today of
$250, $100, $50, $25, or any amount you can afford?
A victory for me is a victory for
ALL Americans!
America's future is bright and I
will work to ensure the flame of freedom continues to burn if I'm
elected to Congress. America wins if AOC loses, and I'm hoping I
can count on your support to make this goal a reality.
Thank you in advance for your
support!
God Bless our great country,

John Cummings
Former NYPD Officer
Republican for Congress
P.S. With your help, we can send
a shot across the bow of America's Left and send a strong and
unmistakable message that AOC's vision of America is not ours!
Please ACT NOW. Your contribution of $250, $100, $50, or even $25
will make a HUGE difference in this race and will send AOC
PACKING!

DEFEAT
AOC

PAID FOR BY CUMMINGS
FOR CONGRESS

Please take a minute to read the special
message from our sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep
our news service free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of USA Freedom Fighters.

© 2020 USA Freedom Fighters

I was just reviewing a campaign update my team sent over and I wanted to personally follow up with you.

My liberal opponent is surging and new polling shows I’m trailing by a couple points.

name: Mary Mancini
subject: no goal in mind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Locally targeted digital ads are going to make the difference for Tennessee Democratic candidates these next 11 days. As we mentioned, Facebook changed their policy so that all new political ads have to be posted by this Tuesday in order to run through the election.
I’m asking you today to donate, but with no specific goal. Literally every dollar we raise for digital ads will allow us to reach more Tennessee voters – so we are trying to raise as much as humanly possible.
This race isn’t just about Donald Trump. So many important decisions that affect each and every Tennessean are made at the local level. If it upset you when Bill Lee and his GOP minions met in a locked capital building at midnight to pass a bill banning all abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest; if it upset you that throughout the state mask mandates were not enforced or taken seriously; if you’re struggling because of the economic impact of the pandemic – remember that all of these things and more are on the ballot.
Tennessee needs leadership at every level of government that will strive to protect and support ALL Tennesseans. If you can, please make a donation right now. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini

Tonight's Presidential debate will be the FINAL time President Trump and Joe Biden square off on-stage before the November 3rd election.

There is a lot riding on how tonight goes. You and I both know that the future of the Granite State, and our country, could be determined by how the President does tonight.

He was already able to dodge one debate, and President Trump has him on the ropes.

But that's why this is so important. President Trump needs to score a resounding victory tonight to pave the way for victory on November 3rd, and he can't do it without your support.

Just $5 will get your name on the President's list tonight. _**[Click or tap here to add your name!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7c1334f831ec5c76/90dd7749be62f7bfc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_
**We need to win this seat, keep the Senate RED, and support President Trump for four more years!

Thanks so much for chipping in,

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Is Governor Walz on the Ballot this November?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_retarge&n=1)
---
Peter \-- There was an interesting headline in The Star Tribune over the weekend:
## Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz not on the ballot this year? Think again
[Did you see that the Strib wrote about us in the article](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=njZW7APv9ZjWe_0fvGjiu0b9g1bNSzOlA43jN1tY0pKuekTwLAMS5BcU6LjuYCkbk1gFeG2_cFoghRSZZpgG533XRsX48MAx-gLOlUaquvWK_cCI3qGN8t6wvOpNDGZTOZGv3baOnTefAb8LLqYjVQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_retarge&n=2), recognizing that you and I mean business when it comes to Ending Walz' Emergency Powers? Some Republicans are on the attack against Walz. Mailers by the conservative **Action 4 Liberty slam** swing-district Democrats, including freshman Rep. Dan Wolgamott in St. Cloud, for "protecting Walz's illegal powers." That's right! We are **slamming** politicians like Dan Wolgamott and his desk mates Brad Tabke & Rob Ecklund because they are compromising our children's education and harming our paychecks by protecting Walz' Emergency Powers. **Thousands of voters received our mailers this month telling them how their legislator is voting. And since there isn't another legislative session before November 3rd, we MUST keep slamming them more.** Dan Wolgamott is the Shutdown King of St Cloud. Are you aware that the popular bar/restaurant Rollies Rednecks in Wolgamott's district was forced to shutdown by Walz' small business hit squad? These people are drunk with power! Action 4 Liberty proudly stands with you and small businesses against Walz & Wolgamott's abuse of power. Which is why we are running digital ads in his district and others, alerting voters to the damage they are causing. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/shutdown_kings?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_retarge&n=3) If we want to End Walz' Emergency Powers, politicians like these guys MUST go! We have a dozen bad politicians on our radar for not Ending Walz' Emergency Power. But I'm afraid without a major cash infusion, we'll have to significantly cut back our targets leaving little room for error to stop Walz. **We need your help to get this message out to more voters. The election is less than two weeks away. So every dollar spent, is more powerful than at any other point in the year.** | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_retarge&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_retarge&n=5)
---
Trust me, I'm well aware of every group and candidate asking you for money right now. Most of them are making empty promises. Typical politicians!
Action 4 Liberty has a proven record of putting our money where it is most effectively used. We've been able to flip 5 Democrats in the House to vote against their governor and for our bill.
Remember, back in April we could only find 15 Republicans to sign on to our End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution. Now we are only four votes from sending a powerful message to the political elite!
Unfortunately, Wolgamott, Tabke and others didn't want to listen to us before election time. So it's time to SLAM these vulnerable Democrats.
## [Yes, I want to SLAM these Democrats!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_retarge&n=6)
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S.****[Please help us make these Democrats pay for voting against our liberty. Pitch in $100 if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or for max pain, donate $1,000.](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_retarge&n=7)**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_retarge&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_retarge&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=star_tribune_retarge&n=10), software for leaders.

---
| Peter,

**[There is still so much more work to do before Election Day.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrkfnODQ6VEAFQarARPhbwlE-Ncb_huZLa4k6AOIiis=/qQAEYDvnadmHfxUxX6gJ6eObyopvKxRiVRul9BAgsfw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201022-1-EM&amount=25)** There are so many potential voters across the district, and we need to do all we can to ensure they have their voices heard this election.
---
| [HELP US REACH VOTERS ](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrkfnODQ6VEAFQarARPhbwlE-Ncb_huZLa4k6AOIiis=/qQAEYDvnadmHfxUxX6gJ6eObyopvKxRiVRul9BAgsfw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201022-1-EM&amount=25)
---
**[There 's no doubt about it: this is the most consequential election of our lifetimes. It's critical we energize and mobilize people across the district, state, and country.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrkfnODQ6VEAFQarARPhbwlE-Ncb_huZLa4k6AOIiis=/qQAEYDvnadmHfxUxX6gJ6eObyopvKxRiVRul9BAgsfw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201022-1-EM&amount=25)**

Virginians are fired up this election. More than 150,000 Virginians have cast their ballots in Virginia's 7th District already. And our team's hard work is paying off: VA-07 had the second-largest gain of early voting this year of all the districts in Virginia!

We're reaching these incredible numbers because of the work of our campaign's dedicated field team. Every day, they are reaching hundreds of potential voters here in VA-07 via phone banks, yard sign distributions, and literature drops.

**[In critical, competitive districts like VA-07, every last vote matters.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrkfnODQ6VEAFQarARPhbwlE-Ncb_huZLa4k6AOIiis=/qQAEYDvnadmHfxUxX6gJ6eObyopvKxRiVRul9BAgsfw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201022-1-EM&amount=25)** Our team is working in overdrive to reach everyone we can, but we need your help. We need to raise $10,000 by tonight to maximize our field team efforts.

_**[Peter, can you contribute to my re-election campaign today to help us reach this goal and do all we can in these final two weeks?](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrkfnODQ6VEAFQarARPhbwlE-Ncb_huZLa4k6AOIiis=/qQAEYDvnadmHfxUxX6gJ6eObyopvKxRiVRul9BAgsfw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201022-1-EM&amount=25)**_
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrkfnODQ6VEAFQarARPhbwlE-Ncb_huZLa4k6AOIiis=/qQAEYDvnadmHfxUxX6gJ6eObyopvKxRiVRul9BAgsfw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201022-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Every single contribution will allow us to expand voter turnout in the district and let Central Virginians know about my record of fighting for the district. **[Eyes across the country will be watching our district on Election Night. Let 's show them just how strong our grassroots support is.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrkfnODQ6VEAFQarARPhbwlE-Ncb_huZLa4k6AOIiis=/qQAEYDvnadmHfxUxX6gJ6eObyopvKxRiVRul9BAgsfw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201022-1-EM&amount=25)**

Thanks, _Abigail_

body:
The Left is flooding South Carolina with liberal dollars to defeat Senator Graham. | [](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56654545:WpHIpvKON:m:1:1155937413:1BF57812C7674B624236201CDF425B5D:r)
---
Peter,

Conservatives across the country have felt the impact of Democrats' obstructionist and radical behavior - but perhaps none more so than United States Senator Lindsey Graham.

Senator Graham has been one of President Trump's strongest allies, and that's made the Left furious.

Democrats have made it clear Lindsey Graham is one of their top targets. **[Peter, that's why I'm asking you to join President Trump and me by offering Lindsey Graham your endorsement and support today.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56654545:WpHIpvKON:m:1:1155937413:1BF57812C7674B624236201CDF425B5D:r)**

| [**Stand with Lindsey Graham!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56654545:WpHIpvKON:m:1:1155937413:1BF57812C7674B624236201CDF425B5D:r)
---

**[CONTRIBUTE $10](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56654546:WpHIpvKON:m:1:1155937413:1BF57812C7674B624236201CDF425B5D:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $35](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56654547:WpHIpvKON:m:1:1155937413:1BF57812C7674B624236201CDF425B5D:r)**

I know it's hard to believe, but polls suggest Lindsey Graham's race is a "statistical tie."

_How?_ Because the Left is flooding South Carolina with liberal dollars to defeat Senator Graham.

His liberal opponent, Jaime Harrison, just released his fundraising numbers, and they are record-setting. **He raised $57 million in just three months - $20 million more than Beto O'Rourke's record in 2018.**

[**Stand with Lindsey Graham!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56654545:WpHIpvKON:m:1:1155937413:1BF57812C7674B624236201CDF425B5D:r)
---

Peter, we cannot afford to lose the Republican majority in the Senate. **[Will you join me by offering Lindsey Graham your endorsement and support today?](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56654545:WpHIpvKON:m:1:1155937413:1BF57812C7674B624236201CDF425B5D:r)**

Because the Left is flooding South Carolina with liberal dollars to defeat Senator Graham. His liberal opponent, Jaime Harrison, just released his fundraising numbers, and they are record-setting. The Illinois 16th is in play. A year ago, it sure did look like a longshot. But we have seen here what we have seen happen in races all across the cou | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d4bfc551a092/this-district-is-in-play?e=140a9b81e7)

#
The Illinois 16th is in play.

A year ago, it sure did look like a longshot. But we have seen here what we have seen happen in races all across the country: races that used to be solid Republican are competitive in 2020.

In the Illinois 16th, we are going to replicate what so many did in 2018 - we are going to catch a Republican incumbent sleeping at the wheel.

Everyday I am talking to dozens of Republican voters in the district who no longer find a home in Trump’s GOP and say that they are voting for the full Democratic slate. This district - and so many others - are going to see a major swing come November.

This race is competitive, but that doesn’t mean that it’s on everyone’s radar. **That is why I need your help.** [Can I count on you to chip in and help us flip a competitive district this November?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6a260d48cb&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

body:
We produced this ad to expose his pro-abortion opponent.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019owu_CDZq1MNhwePBP-3F4S-P08rWr6Bfutnwmhzc-yX5tzgLfaLGWK3BubzYwYy1Jg0bKFABEHs6Uy6RnQxKiLjBczh0NdyIYMR-wmNoeJ8z7snIj8OP5kIlpkX9x6KyVgUHZAXl7iGjHIs5rDhw91lYtmZzUN9YP54kU4syNhhRlbj_MHrDl_jcqu3H_sxdlre7JV5eGbQuIr-KOoUhE9DHZbR8ii8pi3PGgYRHN4KCHFE-BD18ItLj_TPiKY2tn2CqCPPv77cgUi_z6H2EvqK576LsiP3XtIrDtqGK2I=&c=BtRNc6T4AjmIcA2DyB4gk1hVTNH5NDI4jYDD7JKBM13u4J0mF4hbUg==&ch=2UM_FL3BVyWucUJrgMPDOoQ4-piOi5v1o1bM3VeYHcyPZWf23P2OfQ==)

Friend,
---
I was very concerned to see that Senator Lindsey Graham is now **TIED** in his race against Jaime Harrison.
---
_And now that confirmation hearings for Judge Amy Coney Barrett have concluded, Planned Parenthood will continue attacking Graham, who chairs the Senate Judiciary Committee._
---
_So our team produced an ad to ensure swing voters in South Carolina know that Jaime Harrison believes abortion should be legal up until 9 MONTHS in the womb._
---
**But while we have enough funds on hand to keep the ad up through this afternoon,**it will stop running** unless we raise another $14,560 before the next ad-buy deadline at 5:15 P.M. TONIGHT.**
---

clean_body: Peter, President Trump endorsed my campaign yesterday, and I could not be more honored. Did you see the tweet? The President is 100% correct. I’m not a career politician — I’m a businessman who knows what it takes to grow a company, create and maintain jobs, and take care of workers in Illinois and across America. My opponent Lauren Underwood is a rank-and-file Democrat who sides with Nancy Pelosi on every single vote, thinks the violent protests plaguing our cities are “beautiful” to watch, and has failed Illinoisans time after time. We only have DAYS to go before the election, and I need your help to get out the vote. We need to flip this seat, and win back our GOP majority in the House! If you agree with President Trump that I’m the commonsense conservative to defeat Lauren Underwood on November 3rd, please send your best gift ASAP! Together we can defeat Lauren Underwood, support President Trump, and Keep America Great! Thanks for your support, Jim Oberweis | | Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee id:2020-10-21-20:04:18:324t

subject: Got a favor to ask....

body:

Please only make a donation if you can afford to do so._

Friend Virginians are leading the fight to defend our democracy -- with election offices across the Commonwealth reporting record turnout for early voting and mail-in ballots! We're making history. But with so many voters casting their ballots ahead of November 3rd, we need to organize even harder to elect leaders up and down the ballot who will fight on behalf of our communities. So today, I'm asking you to stand with my friend Elaine Luria, a first-term Democratic congresswoman who is defending a toss-up seat in one of the most competitive races in the nation. [Will you chip in right now to make sure she has the resources she needs to Get Out The Vote across VA-02?](https://act.myngp.com/el/8GK4eLUA59uu5QjmMq-oHkkz1oi8koClNVWRNS0nza8=/F0UUb0i54v-lD3SaUmwtSsFTUoIZtJmELWHwyJYtYQs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8GK4eLUA59uu5QjmMq-oHkkz1oi8koClNVWRNS0nza8=/F0UUb0i54v-lD3SaUmwtSsFTUoIZtJmELWHwyJYtYQs=) A 20-year Navy veteran, Elaine ran for Congress as a first-time candidate because Coastal Virginians weren't getting the representation they deserved. She flipped Virginia's Second District by just 2.3 points in 2018, but Trump won it by 3. She's a top target for national Republicans seeking to take back the House -- outside groups are spending over $3 million to help former Republican Congressman Scott Taylor defeat her. And with recent polling showing Elaine TIED with Taylor, she needs our help to fight back against the flood of dark money about to be poured into this battleground race. [Chip in to help keep this champion for Virginians in Congress >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/8GK4eLUA59uu5QjmMq-oHkkz1oi8koClNVWRNS0nza8=/F0UUb0i54v-lD3SaUmwtSsFTUoIZtJmELWHwyJYtYQs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8GK4eLUA59uu5QjmMq-oHkkz1oi8koClNVWRNS0nza8=/F0UUb0i54v-lD3SaUmwtSsFTUoIZtJmELWHwyJYtYQs=) Thank you, Ralph Northam

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597

subject: A biblical view of socialism
body:

We’ve put together helpful resources for you to think well about the critical issues and to share with others as they prepare to vote. name: Jim Jordan
subject: My final endorsement request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Won't you please consider personally endorsing me for re-election before it's too late? It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=7f5534f8b5ef4654923b2f024ed01c8c&_e=OUid9GQ5s1PJozK8r-6uDteCsxPfV-szGhMbnIterdeLtR2O3zWhVj6v3SArc7Myyl74zbVOsM0VZRd0mbjeEm-WwBskbL9CJgvs4gwvjWhNvE4qydknkgi-a9iMllKQC5_H0olLU6zs3ZjiuEJxr8EfC75Pywxnld-jzRWKGWTb4Nh78aK77ZAXLJOlcr4ZOqR5mItdA9tSHriLaYhtNT5FksmcQr1hXRHbXC9Jg1MRaBN26BrthhB5RamEl9xR_uBYHsrlsiCKcRB2I0J8JoTC5YaoyFuu9-OLL_4OIA_0VfwME2U8GDR6ESESKZA5-r41EVRXak5pHyU3V7K-BsG9S0mPyYrvZbeP36PIeTqE9ZresMlizvbjQumeQ_6VoFBlLIKbYhD8YL9HgkIwhWeY1gwe3Sz1vf5sfcf1HicO6qOrHHFLxGHVWYyr9Xfj51OHEMSGz9CmgRyk0FO7XgpQ-cKhknbcCFLtAGboV-4%3D)
---

Peter,

We’re getting down to the wire. Election Day is right around the corner, and it has become increasingly clear that there are two very different visions for our country being debated.

One vision which consists of:
* Limited government and support for individual liberty
* A pro-growth, deregulatory agenda
* Keeping the American economy OPEN

And Joe Biden's vision which consists of:
* Raising taxes
* Defunding the police
* Holding our economy hostage

We’ll continue doing our part to fight back against the radical left and help put President Trump over the finish line, but our fighting comes at a cost and we need to know that you will have our back. **[That’s why today I’m asking you to re-affirm your endorsement of my campaign](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=7f5534f8b5ef4654923b2f024ed01c8c&_e=OUid9GQ5s1PJozK8r-6uDteCsxPfV-szGhMbnIterdeLtR2O3zWhVj6v3SArc7Myyl74zbVOsM0VZRd0mbjeEm-WwBskbL9CJgvs4gwvjWhNvE4qydknkgi-a9iMllKQC5_H0olLU6zs3ZjiuEJxr8EfC75Pywxnld-jzRWKGWTb4Nh78aK77ZAXLJOlcr4ZOqR5mItdA9tSHriLaYhtNT5FksmcQr1hXRHbXC9Jg1MRaBN26BrthhB5RamEl9xR_uBYHsrlsiCKcRB2I0J8JiQ8EAb0HU6UzNg7nJBrl6qVRrNZzJ-P5IU44esuh7KLaZrErit6kF_T76J2rsvponlGDvVprGe76P2vEsXi-_qUYTJSjCOrS8Ijy9PFeQhulUNpgqGfhhQd7QsdKzFkIRYuOHz3nDQeW6LqETGlDAk3CZTFMGTHeuxiX8cOGEajVVRgTchNQADew2aKblaagG_QGI1BcghjEnC8DOihVAg%3D)**.

Since we first asked for your endorsement in April, more than 100,000 conservatives have personally endorsed me for re-election. **[Now, with 12 days until the end of this election cycle, we’re setting a goal to grow the number of endorsements to 150,000.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=7f5534f8b5ef4654923b2f024ed01c8c&_e=OUid9GQ5s1PJozK8r-6uDteCsxPfV-szGhMbnIterdeLtR2O3zWhVj6v3SArc7Myyl74zbVOsM0VZRd0mbjeEm-WwBskbL9CJgvs4gwvjWhNvE4qydknkgi-a9iMllKQC5_H0olLU6zs3ZjiuEJxr8EfC75Pywxnld-jzRWKGWTb4Nh78aK77ZAXLJOlcr4ZOqR5mItdA9tSHriLaYhtNT5FksmcQr1hXRHbXC9Jg1MRaBN26BrthhB5RamEl9xR_uBYHsrlsiCKcRB2I0J8JoYmu_iQqozBVoEYA-9qZnO85f0Sf5WEBaHQjQbQzr-WzOoJ1nBZ1TgTiHGnjn6kuarPNYNUFsN1sqFhWWzAMBIgnWLIcVF1Nu4tZRsx2qKwl3beGFqB7FQZvJnrplUiN9z2DleFMsTY_TUSShPw_BDGbWtlXQ7fOJ4qrB0ufbE_4-jyxeeRUDGmq_r-cuEGkH_r1NjzGxqUrQixbL3HCFY%3D)**

[](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=7f5534f8b5ef4654923b2f024ed01c8c&_e=OUid9GQ5s1PJozK8r-6uDteCsxPfV-szGhMbnIterdeLtR2O3zWhVj6v3SArc7Myyl74zbVOsM0VZRd0mbjeEm-WwBskbL9CJgvs4gwvjWhNvE4qydknkgi-a9iMllKQC5_H0olLU6zs3ZjiuEJxr8EfC75Pywxnld-jzRWKGWTb4Nh78aK77ZAXLJOlcr4ZOqR5mItdA9tSHriLaYhtNT5FksmcQr1hXRHbXC9Jg1MRaBN26BrthhB5RamEl9xR_uBYHsrlsiCKcRB2I0J8Jm75L388-HXzQYrVYPU2Lp6bVlGGsAf219Wp7VdHkcwTmmp7Hsq8uj6A3zLB6ZfL_UpTK8L7RRqs7p4D_tfCxH30370_S2Xz50E_pP2TunFfbk7Sfleoe2KAEq6TZiCMARuRKIbICJikS78Z2OMH5P0cPU9DqXby3gGpH45mpZj7o5lqhm4pKYm6JHMu8JJ3pu5IgcHRhqi9PgrzPle3kvQ%3D)

As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, Democrats have long targeted me. They simply cannot stand how we’re helping the American public come to the realization that **[Democrat leaders in the House are more focused on tearing apart the Republican Party than delivering for the American people.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=7f5534f8b5ef4654923b2f024ed01c8c&_e=OUid9GQ5s1PJozK8r-6uDteCsxPfV-szGhMbnIterdeLtR2O3zWhVj6v3SArc7Myyl74zbVOsM0VZRd0mbjeEm-WwBskbL9CJgvs4gwvjWhNvE4qydknkgi-a9iMllKQC5_H0olLU6zs3ZjiuEJxr8EfC75Pywxnld-jzRWKGWTb4Nh78aK77ZAXLJOlcr4ZOqR5mItdA9tSHriLaYhtNT5FksmcQr1hXRHbXC9Jg1MRaBN26BrthhB5RamEl9xR_uBYHsrlsiCKcRB2I0J8Juu9nBnqFC5K66ndB4um21nLsj4IfeyAyKEbp42FjxBEJmYZt0aUKSL5WS58vPe4KYEkHkmUdUKtICUvrt43skYm5asfC-nXOX0dtPsvaw557-xCi0YYIMqgKbqFxopzuTnftAZI0SuJXwrZ57HHXt06o2M3gDJXJ9SbmSwalxFXVw8OUACyhYLoxzttCiBzV7rsBNWoWw70JXEns6GHpSE%3D)**

If you agree with me that:

* We need to keep the American economy OPEN
* Do everything we can to keep socialist sympathizers out of power
* Stop the left’s campaign of “cancel culture”

**[Then please consider endorsing my campaign for re-election today.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=7f5534f8b5ef4654923b2f024ed01c8c&_e=OUid9GQ5s1PJozK8r-6uDteCsxPfV-szGhMbnIterdeLtR2O3zWhVj6v3SArc7Myyl74zbVOsM0VZRd0mbjeEm-WwBskbL9CJgvs4gwvjWhNvE4qydknkgi-a9iMllKQC5_H0olLU6zs3ZjiuEJxr8EfC75Pywxnld-jzRWKGWTb4Nh78aK77ZAXLJOlcr4ZOqR5mItdA9tSHriLaYhtNT5FksmcQr1hXRHbXC9Jg1MRaBN26BrthhB5RamEl9xR_uBYHsrlsiCKcRB2I0J8JrXvDsCNbYbLmYKGru8WH1kI7n3NYIiLfp2gky8Pv0CDpF97xROt0wOFH7cjAUYDFJA2Xnly1v6IcYFxrIyKPCN6YVQS-mMBuEHLY1U_JzTHiLDZU1hCYe4zNObp9D7T0B1pnGtiAh2PiWU9-SOCgcadm-DWIKGwQLCKCYjbhmSDrPH6jKRnbHX95zw1CZ8BKyAxqTNWbI5p7Muxe5etrTk%3D)**

**Your endorsement** will serve our team well as I continue to fight for an America FIRST agenda in the House.

For liberty,
Jim Jordan

[](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=7f5534f8b5ef4654923b2f024ed01c8c&_e=OUid9GQ5s1PJozK8r-6uDteCsxPfV-szGhMbnIterdeLtR2O3zWhVj6v3SArc7Myyl74zbVOsM0VZRd0mbjeEm-WwBskbL9CJgvs4gwvjWhNvE4qydknkgi-a9iMllKQC5_H0olLU6zs3ZjiuEJxr8EfC75Pywxnld-jzRWKGWTb4Nh78aK77ZAXLJOlcr4ZOqR5mItdA9tSHriLaYhtNT5FksmcQr1hXRHbXC9Jg1MRaBN26BrthhB5RamEl9xR_uBYHsrlsiCKcRB2I0J8JrPxmGiN2EuqKfhg6M4POFtceluLpwpZiJiin_8lMI8mVYzPXb0pzrJay_oJBE9NE42xL5gO8wB1HAfcdNsi6aDIC2p1q1HehVfdyPRdFwQZAGVHCdniOTx03J9ezKlCJbUVde_hOxuOee86rCoxri6_NZ_0asDfhOWqY1ifBJ4gLwgB9owdejmv0UTmkz4_hgqaiJQZ9ZJTr9QCVoWuNTU%3D)

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.defenddjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_s=7f5534f8b5ef4654923b2f024ed01c8c&_t=iIKMVod5d7Gsc3nah--3RDaiOIR3rB9i4exQP-foMiTMY85PAmmQd9MewZKBmwhnIzzemco134ujiU7zzwqO4kpeDt3vvrdHd7bQYQmFwVU_ZY4uQrwezgHLMYFFsOkVOKHFtMpJvQPRGuFnKmI24lOE9IU2lWUg2WiPYRFTnlI%3D)

Will you please confirm before midnight tonight? | Peter, We’re getting down to the wire. Election Day is right around the corner, and it has become increasingly clear that there are two very different visions for our country being debated. One vision which consists of: Limited government and support for individual liberty A pro-growth, deregulatory agenda Keeping the American economy OPEN And Joe Biden's vision which consists of: Raising taxes Defunding the police Holding our economy hostage We’ll continue doing our part to fight back against the radical left and help put President Trump over the finish line, but our fighting comes at a cost and we need to know that you will have our back. . Since we first asked for your endorsement in April, more than 100,000 conservatives have personally endorsed me for re-election. As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, Democrats have long targeted me. They simply cannot stand how we’re helping the American public come to the realization that If you agree with me that: We need to keep the American economy OPEN Do everything we can to keep socialist sympathizers out of power Stop the left’s campaign of “cancel culture” Your endorsement** will serve our team well as I continue to fight for an America FIRST agenda in the House. For liberty, Jim Jordan Don't want to receive our emails? | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Nancy Mace
subject: we’re taking back our district on Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
We’re closing in on Election Day, and our race is coming down to the wire. We’ve been telling you since Day 1 — this race is one of the most important [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=92e8969718824157bd2e291d7207e4ff&_e=W4o1ufOwpBthX3UWYFnrYNtFEky9Ei1VY3mK6HSVpNwWwYIuEjEgw17lebVl3QP5tCvpzLGPh71lWGJYZBVfAksrlg6YR4MMHZjMCI6W3HIbqfl6zNeQzcMffKZzi2-QrzFzRamnioNRFi63krMriQcknjISwDjy3W9uuztnzsEA3fv6bUOjcRbLIiDGoz6u3rjE5Bv4YM1mjoOUeP91sEVOeCZuVdsoqkT4BAmAuNMgFbHL2qKosOT3kAmnHpoxg9gONIBv-_ZxKwHE-lqvdju2G8N6IVOxPvOrYTGSSaUh6qb-kxYmKJztl992Z5CajjkPtD3jQ9LsHdnQk1EktoW0bRaZeRCtJuuXUkwdJ1xMhnTSq5L0OpJ6GD994jUThV6wA3u5fbCWbJbVF54WdKtMAdnqVYz80e4u-e51Y12Mnqb80-Og5uRFgibQ_3BIiI4BPqiXmP7QQd1LJ94Zpaqux3-xJ9UVInitnYKyYQM%3D) Hey friend - it’s Nancy Mace.
_Do you have a second to chat? _
We’re closing in on Election Day, and our race is coming down to the wire. We’ve been telling you since Day 1 — this race is one of the most important races in the entire country.
My opponent is one of the weakest and most vulnerable Democratic incumbents in the nation and I won’t beat around the bush — this is a seat we absolutely have to win. We need to take back the Lowcountry and return real leadership to South Carolina’s First District.
**Now, it’s not going to be easy. **
But very few things that are worth doing in life are easy.
_Being the first woman to graduate from The Citadel wasn’t easy. Being a single mom sure isn’t easy either. _
**But friend, those are two of the most rewarding experiences of my entire life. **
Our opponent has a big war chest, and the support of big-time DC insiders like Nancy Pelosi. He’s been outspending us on the airwaves every step of the way, but we can’t let him drown out our Lowcountry first message.
We need to keep pushing — I never give up, it’s not in my DNA.
And I know you won’t either, friend.
Before you click out of this email, I’d like to ask for a favor. I’m counting on small-dollar donors like you to come through for me down the stretch of this campaign — will you donate any amount below to help us compete on the airwaves during the final sprint to Election Day?
**Chip in here:[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-1635075/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=92e8969718824157bd2e291d7207e4ff&_e=W4o1ufOwpBthX3UWYFnrYNtFEky9Ei1VY3mK6HSVpNwWwYIuEjEgw17lebVl3QP5tCvpzLGPh71lWGJYZBVfAksrlg6YR4MMHZjMCI6W3HIbqfl6zNeQzcMffKZzi2-QrzFzRamnioNRFi63krMriQcknjISwDjy3W9uuztnzsEA3fv6bUOjcRbLIiDGoz6u3rjE5Bv4YM1mjoOUeP91sEVOeCZuVdsoqkT4BAmAuNMgFbHL2qKosOT3kAmnHpoxg9gONIBv-_ZxKwHE-lqvdo_MMhSLW2CrHzoLfz1NPJiZegT8TVwpXSGALP8sE7VTXqh3ldpHcRD6V5dZUqqKoADKGZA6zyaPvCODfEiDMiMFDE5nOyYDaILPogsFUmeFGVMqMG5Lg87YwmSIwnf-NmmbXM9mKSxvU200r_AvlTh1BIbzW4MqDLL7AtxdkvO4lnO_4EPYL_VReqY5cskxrG6ZdI8Fg1UBxrndwpVTod0%3D)**
Thank you for reading,
Nancy Mace |

name: Elliot
subject: fwd: We are so close to Taking Back New Hampshire.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| Derek, When we built our plans to take back the New Hampshire State House in 2020, we knew it would be an extremely close and competitive election. Now, with less than 2 weeks to go until the election the polls are showing that we were right - we're currently projected to have a slight majority in the New Hampshire House while our Senate and Executive Council are currently tied according to UNH's latest polling.
The momentum is on our side but we need to [_**finish the job and win big on November 3rd**_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTM3NjQwMDg3MTUwNDAwNjg4JmM9dzRwNCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzY2NTg2MjYmZD1uMGw3djBx.LHz1RQsn6-iaqrrjBAb3MGIPVs_A8lkg3ji5wb3qdbM) so that Governor Chris Sununu can have majorities in the House, Senate, and Executive Council that will work with him to protect the NH Advantage.
The New Hampshire Republican Party is doing more to elect our candidates this year than has ever been done before. [_**Contribute today and you'll help New Hampshire Republicans secure their victories on November 3rd.**_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTM3NjQwMDg3MTUwNDAwNjg4JmM9dzRwNCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzY2NTg2NDQmZD16NGc0bzFu.GLR2uek9brE2siw62-vumos-diLJbFCA_O6hCbt0pY0)
Best, Elliot
|

Derek,
We are so close to taking back our Granite State on November 3rd and the polls are showing that momentum is on our side.
[ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTM3NjQwMDg3MTUwNDAwNjg4JmM9dzRwNCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzY2NTg2NzEmZD1mM3E3eTRk.6LAQGJUwF5emkUW0XnyXeqcyILbRjM6TLWFDLkrLW_k)

Since September, UNH polls have shown clear movement in our direction towards our efforts to **FLIP** the New Hampshire House while our Senate and Executive Council races are **TIED**.

We are in the homestretch. #
Hey there, #TeamDani volunteers!

Election Day is almost upon us (12 days away!) and we need your help this weekend to make calls and get out the vote for Dani!

We have 8 different phonebanking shifts this weekend, and you can sign up for 1 or 2 of them [here!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=69047c0ea1&e=140a9b81e7) These calls that we make to voters are absolutely critical to us finishing strong and flipping this seat from red to blue.

Join us this weekend, and let's unseat Adam Kinzinger together!

Team Dani

| Dear Fellow American,

Today, Judicial Watch is carrying its biggest, and I happen to think most important caseload in 26 years.
It includes critically important lawsuits against agencies of the federal government... particularly the Justice and State Departments (which despite Attorney General Barr's efforts remain effectively controlled by the Deep State and continue to stonewall our lawful requests for critical documents).
So I must turn to you for additional help:
**[Can I count on you to make a special donation right now to support our work?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51815&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMjIxNTI1MTY=)**
I had hoped that the Trump administration would address unlawful government secrecy issues more aggressively...but Deep State career bureaucrats embedded in every government department are continuing to fight our transparency requests and lawsuits.
Plus, the pace of our work and calls for legal and investigative assistance we're receiving from around the country are accelerating. New challenges range from increasing threats to election integrity, to unlawful sanctuary policies, to ongoing Deep State efforts to destroy the Trump presidency and cover-up crimes committed by Hillary Clinton and other Obama administration officials.
Many concerned citizens and honest public officials are seeking our help to enforce the rule of law. And I do not want to turn away even one important corruption, open government, illegal immigration or election integrity case as demands on us are at an all-time high.
[Your additional donation now will help us make the most of the challenges and opportunities facing us](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51815&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMjIxNTI1MTY=) including:

* **Aggressively moving forward with our lawsuits (now numbering 65) exposing the Deep State conspiracy to target and destroy President Trump**.

* **Doubling our legal challenges against illegal "sanctuary" policies that unlawfully prohibit local police from cooperating with federal immigration authorities**.

* **Adding more resources to our highly successful Election Integrity Initiative to help clean the voter rolls**.

There is so much work to do which is [why I'm asking for your additional help today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51815&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMjIxNTI1MTY=). Judicial Watch is the one conservative institution in Washington that Americans can rely on to stand firm for the rule of law. Thank you!
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton
President

body:

I’ll be blunt, we are coming up short on our fundraising at one of the most critical moments in the campaign. My finance team told me this morning that if we don't hit our October goal, then we will have to cut our digital spend in the final week.

If you've given before I would really appreciate another donation, and if you’ve been waiting to give, now is the time. Will you make a donation of any amount right now? secure.actblue.com/donate/2010-q4-rh?refcode=201022-email-am

Thank you for your support!

-- Rita Hart

name: True the Vote
subject: The Election Integrity Hotline is Now Open!
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=275A612A20A2745)
---
| | Hi Friend,
We are all citizen watchdogs and True the Vote is working harder than ever to make sure you have the tools you need to help protect our election process from fraud and exploitation. Recently, we launched an Election Integrity Hotline - a 24/7, bilingual resource to support election workers, poll watchers, and voters during this unprecedented time. This hotline is in addition to our [Election Integrity Report](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=275A612A20A2746) which you can also always access on our website.
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=275A612A20A2746)
---
| | We encourage you to either fill out the report or call our hotline if you witness (or have witnessed) election fraud or manipulation. You can also submit pictures or videos from your cell phone or any other documentation or evidence. From there, our rapid response network will respond and take action as necessary.

Feel free to share this resource with your friends, family, co-workers, and others in your community. Right now, citizens like you are critical in defending the integrity of our elections and our country. Thank you for staying engaged! Thank you for all that you do!

Onward,
The True the Vote Team
---
| | [ FILE A REPORT ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=275A612A20A2746)

body:
| | |
---
| | Friends,

Last week, I was honored to welcome Republican House Leader Kevin McCarthy to Garden City. I was thankful Leader McCarthy accepted my invitation to tour the Big First.

He toured Conestoga's ethanol plant and met with ag producers and folks from throughout Western Kansas. During his remarks, he spoke about the battle that conservatives are fighting and why this election is so crucial to the future of our country.

---
| [ ](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=d3db330c62&e=a9d1410029)
---
|
---
| Leader McCarthy is absolutely correct. We are fighting for the very idea our country was founded upon, the thing that makes our country the greatest in the world. Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the Leftist mob want to dismantle our republic and transform into something far from what our Founding Father's intended.

**I am running for congress to stand against the mob,[_will you stand with me?_](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=12484ad1ce&e=a9d1410029)**

Our team is working hard as we push towards election day. We are also working closely with fellow Republicans across the ballot to ensure Kansas stays red. Your [donation](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=97249a30c0&e=a9d1410029) will aid our efforts fighting for rural, conservative values from the state house to the Senate.
---
| [Help Elect Republican Leaders](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=32da4639c3&e=a9d1410029 "Help Elect Republican Leaders")
---
| The Left may shout louder, but we are **stronger.** I am asking you to [stand with me](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=2a9167cf27&e=a9d1410029).

Stand for **Freedom.**
Stand for **Law and Order.**
Stand for **Life.**
Stand for **America.**

We are nearly to the finish line, thank you for your immense support thus far. [Together](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=449006a35b&e=a9d1410029), we will protect the idea that is America.
---
| Yours in the fight,

Tracey
---

Peter,

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Last night, I went head to head against Ben Ray Lujan’s DC partisan, political playbook and our New Mexico values campaign won the day! We are down to the last 12 days and I need your help right now to turn this momentum into an election day victory. With only 12 days left I need your backing if we are going to win. It was an honor to fight for our New Mexico values live on TV, and I can’t wait to keep fighting for you everyday in the Senate. If you can, | | | Ben Ray Lujan thought he could recite DNC/Pelosi/Schumer talking points about how Republicans are evil, but that’s not going to work in this race and it didn’t work in tonight’s debate. New Mexicans know that I am fighting for them and that I will do everything I can, even working across the aisle, to help build a safer, more prosperous New Mexico. | | | Thank you so much for your support, Mark P.S. Last night our New Mexico values campaign defeated Ben Ray Lujan’s DC partisan political playbook. He thought he could win by reciting DNC talking points about how Republicans are evil, but the people of New Mexico know me and my campaign. They know that I will work across the aisle to bring real change to our state. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

From: **Team Lizzie** <info@lizziefletcher.com>
Date: Wed, Oct 21, 2020 at 8:11 AM
Subject: Our opponent's poll numbers
____
He's trying to make our race look competitive.

|

---

| | **Our opponent released a poll that shows he’s trailing Lizzie by only two points.**|
---
While we question the quality of his polling, we know this much is true: he will use it to raise lots of money to spend against Lizzie from now until Election Day. His message is already bringing in campaign cash, and Ted Cruz and Kevin McCarthy are raising lots of money for their star recruit.

We also know we can’t take anything for granted. That’s why we are asking for your help — again.

_**There are only 13 days left until the election. So we’ve set a three-day goal to raise $13,000 by 11:59 p.m. this Friday. You can contribute here → **_

#TeamLizzie is working around the clock to get out our message and share the important work Lizzie is doing in Congress to help Houston get through the pandemic, protect health care and protections for pre-existing conditions, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more.

Chad, we need to finish strong. You can make that possible.

_**If you can, contribute toward our $13,000 goal before Friday to get our message out and make that two-point poll a distant memory on Election Night.**_

Thanks,

Team Lizzie

But I vow to keep fighting. | Friend, My Democrat opponent has finally seen the poll I released showing that our election is statistically tied within the margin of error. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Before Biden takes the stage tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek,
Joe Biden will take the stage tonight to debate Trump for the last time in this election -- and with just 12 days until Election Day, we need to show him that we have his back. Joe has been my friend for more than 40 years and in that time I’ve never seen him back down from a fight. He made us proud in the first debate and I can’t wait to see him on that stage tonight. **[I’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 for Joe Biden before the debate starts tonight to show him and Kamala that our team has his back. clean_body: | | | Derek, Joe Biden will take the stage tonight to debate Trump for the last time in this election -- and with just 12 days until Election Day, we need to show him that we have his back. Joe has been my friend for more than 40 years and in that time I’ve never seen him back down from a fight. He made us proud in the first debate and I can’t wait to see him on that stage tonight. | | | | | Time is running out and our window to make an impact in this election is closing. Let’s show up for Joe and Kamala before the big night. Thanks, Terry Paid for by Virginians for Common Good | | Sent via . name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Release: Fletcher Drops The Ball On Energy Policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Fletcher Drops The Ball On Energy Policy**

Houston, TX - This morning, Representative Fletcher's record as an advocate for Houston's Energy Corridor, the lifeblood of Congressional District 7, took another hit when it was revealed that the [American Energy Alliance (AEA) gave her a 37% approval rating](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=7ebd8ddddfde4572b3c5d7cdfbf4b9d7&_e=ZX_J9tXlRXKlQSbC3OIw0CSKyplAEyIiQ9YbvshCVYIYLltCgPHS67v4z5QeiyAyQmk2QC0GSil6od9NdVyT3VZ1_wP-t_CHqy6O_PoEA3C9ZVG0qVhUfNoTBmTpBErACs0D9Wc9GNe4UdTD5jbrZ8XKxYk-7GxLM125QAMkJsoeTeaahNGIWLu16RVryTQHqU9EYxH_z-ESSthiIaW60RneIHjMJ_2etJ5dIRbDFJJarz9XSbaZyTlKQCCXcf_SxbTVTl5pnQX7tHWt3Em2KH20CeKSUndMX_SMYmSc8Ud3jWYSJNoNOllAF14M5SyqszGiDo31v94cdSmdQDokewQCN6Na8ZcQ3gBnepdvArM%3D) based on her record in Congress. This remarkably low approval rating was derived from Fletcher's record on legislation important to the energy industry. Fletcher's 37% approval rating diverges sharply from the promises she made to voters in 2018 and is indicative of the anti-energy positions she has taken while in Congress, including:
* Allowing Pelosi to strip funding for Houston's energy corridor from the _CARES Act;_
* Voting to return the United States to the _Paris Climate Accords_ , which would eliminate countless Houston jobs with no real benefit in global emissions;
* Supporting limits on the transportation of natural gas;
* And, voting for what her colleagues referred to as the "principles of the _Green New Deal_ ," giving billions of tax dollars to _Green New Deal_ projects while Houston energy workers struggle amidst the coronavirus pandemic.

Hundreds of thousands of Houstonians work in the oil and gas industry, and the majority of these oil and gas companies are headquartered right here in the 7th District. Families throughout our city and our country rely on the dependable, affordable energy these companies produce and distribute. While Democrats in Washington continue to play politics with federal energy policy, the livelihoods of Houston workers hang in the balance. Houston needs an advocate who will put the interests of these Houston families first, not sacrifice them to the political ambitions of Nancy Pelosi.

_"It is no surprise that Representative Fletcher, a moderate in name only, has received an abysmal 37% approval rating from the AEA,"_**said Communications Director Jackie Modesett.**_"Her voting record in Washington speaks volumes, and it couldn't be more disconnected from the promises she's made to Houston families. From allowing Pelosi to strip funding for Houston's Energy Corridor from the CARES Act to supporting what her colleagues on the Transportation Committee call the 'Green New Deal 2.0,' Fletcher has failed to stand up for Houston energy workers. These policies have real costs to Houstonians; they directly impact the affordability of our energy and the ability of hardworking families to put food on the table. Houstonians are tired of Fletcher's empty promises and are fed up with seeing their livelihoods used as political props. This is yet another reason why the Hunt campaign is seeing such a strong outpouring of support; the 7th District is ready for change."_

Wesley Hunt is a Houston native and battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.
###

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

subject: Friend, there's no denying this

body:

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - our favorite pizzas in Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
There are a lot of late nights at the Holcomb Crew HQ, and that means our team has been ordering a lot of pizza to keep us going. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=83e5146574e34a65bcfa3e7a8571bd0b&_e=XBjVMMNyYvBq-JvJkXq0yAfIZUbDCu0nEWiQ2vmHF23oM5hsUusMqABfbWoCPndz56vVcx1Zc26hBTNePAr0Qc8Q1P9GJWGu0GwbRZU_bBuSkyCsTzNLR4M9Qc3jmX91n2v_vFs5WC70RU42SRjtUQg6DhN41XwOqaf-HUzYdYn1X3GvdiFUDhBsv-vTJc5UeyxKFXGDgyIAF3to9v24rUXgQuAx9uuBc43qQrol6LyCx98zaEqc5YlgPKBU-Yp8YBtI0wWRmXqp__JXhzU-GG_mIbPLXsDqaGSWep8zco048qu_8gOlXpAKFVv1tfquny_bvA2L2fvogeFHWbTJepeUy7nDhGBcBqLwNtL2v7wTuD7bhfozgNqtY0bT_T6MoGcvwlGwujf6eSOJu2ctfUDpHE0vHePTMT2WvNkY4bVxjZrOBqGO6ImCNFwmX0ytx1I94EDNkuYQ6jtqXy-7iQD6tudkEKhPpGrHZvnup-o%3D) Friends, We’re in the final stretch of our campaign.
That means there are a lot of late nights at the Holcomb Crew HQ, and that means our team has been ordering a lot of late night pizza to keep us going. It’s one of our favorite foods, and we’ve tried more than our fair share of pizza joints across our state. It’s so important that we support these small businesses and job creators in our communities. They’ve adjusted their way of doing business to keep it safe (so check for amended hours!) -- and we, too, must do our part to follow all local health guidelines while chowing down.
Let’s (safely) support our local pizzeria -- and here’s a few of our favorites. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=83e5146574e34a65bcfa3e7a8571bd0b&_e=XBjVMMNyYvBq-JvJkXq0yAfIZUbDCu0nEWiQ2vmHF23oM5hsUusMqABfbWoCPndz56vVcx1Zc26hBTNePAr0Qc8Q1P9GJWGu0GwbRZU_bBuSkyCsTzNLR4M9Qc3jmX91n2v_vFs5WC70RU42SRjtUQg6DhN41XwOqaf-HUzYdYn1X3GvdiFUDhBsv-vTJc5UeyxKFXGDgyIAF3to9v24rUXgQuAx9uuBc43qQrol6LyCx98zaEqc5YlgPKBU-Yp8YBtI0wWRmXqp__JXhzU-GNhz1VT5yfuXOWll2ho20-5btfB2r5Gv_gpzZBXIUPNr7kX_zgs02r6OFrvq4CI5wRopD1GorMTwSWBwl6KysT5GjhrmQQKUxZpnZoMEpmZjVsK1PnoJLc2z0IJ2nUgj-pi19vhTqRPEPo4IpaH9fMQ7vy1iijFeGD9KqjcwxY8dBwteju9AxM-5oJh7tlNP7MM1hsA2sUHYWQaHUMk5JOc%3D)
* **[Arni’s](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=83e5146574e34a65bcfa3e7a8571bd0b&_e=XBjVMMNyYvBq-JvJkXq0yAYsXY8L6LqijQ-nxm9V_vPoBq6ZRhZTHQ6-V-o4EwRUoqCKM8n4S54rUCC8-NCcAkXfJXobKu7_xKbCM2YPCi6nymwDTx_YmRt5h7CTLtVcv_9541AQ5lJJSDamNfViWbgwwpAa0Cj8g2MUoCHkBqSaQLZfUKIQHpeBNFZ-zHBrDAZ44yCehqmGedwnNgh4PSqbATR8mYUtjUBz4AEz8UUHjCw6TEn4m39wPKz8Np7dyRaSWx6GFuPEDsZZh-cbme33ugs2OOL7YHsNCFLVfLJtgMcem8ea1UvQSQiPVTi4RijMx4WTf-WSYthSl2uirwnqpBwbF4FV_qccjbof59TehKtCrE3vK22FqWze8EtNG7GdykCTjAq7Fp9DnVit4QsyY2uSkwosiXb_B-Esvx8xt6bQ-kt-Fqg0ka8KZPHa5ypN1stTOOIR4u9AtsyvCg%3D%3D) –** Arni’s originally opened at the Market Square Shopping Center in Lafayette in 1966! They now bring their old-school style pizzas to 18 Indiana locations!
* **[Bazbeaux Pizza, Downtown Indy, Carmel& Broad Ripple](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=83e5146574e34a65bcfa3e7a8571bd0b&_e=XBjVMMNyYvBq-JvJkXq0yHxvJ72OrY-lbtIa44BcO_wZC0P6G1_Igf-9yYnubRMg-XJD1XnMeMeOzZ7OSNyEOFLG2wOm3lQd6EXJoczbcCWAPyuBUuGdTX81dacSzJyuqo1IG-K9J7Nnpo_IH_dKwPQsQLFMpWocVmDD4hPOLxYozq3JTg2XpRfE1i66NANFJN8I1dcan5VBRSZ-PmRYfCDTHbjR7ZalRNOZ_7NV44Wql4tNmukSMxfomzlOL7joSqJlYeczCVkzFV7jBbcAV6tC5W1in4Wa0gEX8VtwOWZb02mtXcxNUXSHvxTIm1L7MDgFnw9PTzjGgU8fbY774CZdPhGNsNfNYuQXqJUriONijBJjq3E-p_vzqcGDiyrXCmFY-RNDNSB3FPLgFpP-Xs8clFAq1DBKOH2VF0lNHyqze5ptg_jULof1vuHWeVxvzMW99_GePq1pZ3tr9h5K1g%3D%3D)** – Bazbeaux is no stranger to the “Best Pizza in Indianapolis” title. They have 3 convenient locations where you can try out their pies!
* **[Big Woods Pizza – Nashville, Speedway, Bloomington, Franklin, Noblesville](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=83e5146574e34a65bcfa3e7a8571bd0b&_e=XBjVMMNyYvBq-JvJkXq0yA6lCOuDTAwJG4MsViTf_-PsbCmgmn416LY2TmlgSHBb11_OhJRhs0Yua2BrFRfUlGZBD3xq1zg4j73i1CRD0lIADiViRVGbwhXFiU7qzeDFXAbIORRLoMGs8saaRevVulq6cIUcukpH-7yzYGRjGAr-78NMbwjTvitP5sUcaUt3eX96kWgnGY-q1yKaPVlhU_t3Sql9QH37N54LE2Uks9opkbDei4WGuLuM9Pp66V8p-mk2zpk859dZWCnlVP37ARTewsvTHipewXHj52_MxSvLBIau2_kxCFhuLs6cJV8zhCcIO5yZyMl9rpNGMdzQU_ISb3veMeOgZBAdARMX-hGdz80bJA76Y5DkDHv-TIpLwTGz2sr2D-zvOi_4P1hZTpq5D9tTCn8v7BzKy83A-DslgHIQNdhbawlzBaTVLBkI6GnNJdolJh36CGAmtaySkw%3D%3D)** – Big Woods Pizza is always a fun environment with great beverages and unique pizzas. Be sure to stop by if you’re nearby.
* **[Brozinni Pizzeria – Indianapolis Southside](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=83e5146574e34a65bcfa3e7a8571bd0b&_e=vuFFNqeEzguxWSmGfhl7NFvUQV5Lf6y7xoQwmtNAwnKG6Afsqh0IP0onIEvxIXx7a10tZrYeU22ENuNLKehjwJYXnpzknbZwub8MGpDR4Y8JPq2co4kRo7uLdAvPCTQeNhvYRqatUEc2CyNocLVZcGrhORRFkzbbU7POBkQxCcUFXKkiQIuIKUsLVGOLSMFDf_NFemx9aodAmETlLz_Hz958hT5VO_jj02RV4jIBTo1PLomfcLdVFH8i8slty3HYHzU5mTBVsm_rpV1yeUmWDmPFU8BW5RvZjDZVjZBtxOUHChXSbHjx1r3SVbLaZR28BYns5RcCab8YNilOUX6hx5yGF7fiFM7xSxWIxST9v8TZs0hsXmgWBsvFcvR3H5a81oXJOQh58qoOYyRbNFurSHWAFqiTAgFKqJtQcTVqTUbOPV6yXWej9qBIRxSYDwPqngF9x3rpFrz98R46B_IZug%3D%3D)** – The Almost World Famous Garlic Knuckles, and a giant slice of New York-style pizza are must-tries!
* **[King Dough Pizza - Indianapolis Holy Cross neighborhood](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=83e5146574e34a65bcfa3e7a8571bd0b&_e=vuFFNqeEzguxWSmGfhl7NMlQQ8LpUXW8g6S93V_xtMZO5HVfbROAJzVZACc0pMU-odZNv42asdhHyYuO0_Pjaq8ZLCf7Jrh-kD7oEl2ousObFU7z3BsKurNbqKnmfy1bBPX5ydaurQLOplJ_Nih65qVqKPo0hmbEkeo459pPiZibxefQsk_p0L8Y23-BLH3KWP7rSq_0IVogL1QpphAnv7hakt0iCyBZKVaoZtab2w_Qz0h7WTX9Ca8DpTfbaPpdKopZwy9rBrOpn5Hv4LA4CO_1qmEBQB96WJhKMS9pBpa8WXPIwXHCZgq4Ruu7R-iHQ4tphzSfryyXP_frT2fxQOmJbm3cAGHmiNm7qJQYChXzVi9ZYcMW6TrikZ0c7oN6M4HJkc4MwUifGm0mx0bYPEWx35EyQyLUaLj56e17_pguk1Q95nwn4dZRE4MXpEb19PBpAeiwSGKj8NMSgtggqA%3D%3D)** – King Dough has something for everyone with vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free pizzas and amazing salads.
* **[Mad Anthony’s Brewing Company – Fort Wayne, Auburn, Warsaw, Angola](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=83e5146574e34a65bcfa3e7a8571bd0b&_e=XBjVMMNyYvBq-JvJkXq0yDmO93ywoYameZk9Va4XUVINprJuGbseBnM3R5LuoPTe7xZnKkziVfBxlXcrjWiSTLo0Wuy8mUeT9n07LRQcND83P1odm3GUUsEQlpdyMHHRO0_y77YbPmNRYb6nYUP71bC2LqjA9k2b83tPPd5npLnqWd-NrDSnAgy0oajBn9pc18DrmUw40zBFkwZCOXuAvtL4_up6baZZHY48xwNAkD8uwbMBluQaeClbukdbx87At0CZU0IMHePgz_O6GDv1_nudEqztj4MED0hmUvEM7EEAlBU14t913v6m2nu3hIHjtqSL7TT6fHzxo79t9Ifib6xHCEanU3KeKBZh4aJZuu81x-sGJunaFxMNwa5hn0N8F5vDHD8g9_8SijchaedpLhx5AzjayoLEgB1ehPzcLr60vhmeH_9NjuUs9yEhHpzfiTboSAJR5Zh4EJwusWv-8w%3D%3D)** – Are you a fan of Chicago-style deep dish? You have to check out Mad Anthony’s and enjoy deep-dish pies in a unique place.

clean_body: There are a lot of late nights at the Holcomb Crew HQ, and that means our team has been ordering a lot of pizza to keep us going. Friends, We’re in the final stretch of our campaign. That means there are a lot of late nights at the Holcomb Crew HQ, and that means our team has been ordering a lot of late night pizza to keep us going. It’s one of our favorite foods, and we’ve tried more than our fair share of pizza joints across our state. It’s so important that we support these small businesses and job creators in our communities. They’ve adjusted their way of doing business to keep it safe (so check for amended hours!) -- and we, too, must do our part to follow all local health guidelines while chowing down. Let’s (safely) support our local pizzeria -- and here’s a few of our favorites. – Arni’s originally opened at the Market Square Shopping Center in Lafayette in 1966! They now bring their old-school style pizzas to 18 Indiana locations! – Bazbeaux is no stranger to the “Best Pizza in Indianapolis” title. They have 3 convenient locations where you can try out their pies! – Big Woods Pizza is always a fun environment with great beverages and unique pizzas. Be sure to stop by if you’re nearby. – The Almost World Famous Garlic Knuckles, and a giant slice of New York-style pizza are must-tries! – King Dough has something for everyone with vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free pizzas and amazing salads. – Are you a fan of Chicago-style deep dish? You have to check out Mad Anthony’s and enjoy deep-dish pies in a unique place. – Unbelievable Chicago-style pizza conveniently located near the South Shore Line? You don’t need to cross the state line to get some great deep dish. Sign us up! – The students and staff of IU have voted Mother Bear’s best pizza in Bloomington for ten straight years! – As a basketball fan, Eric (and really, all Hoosiers) can appreciate the basketball memorabilia, signatures, jerseys and magazines on display here. Make sure to try the cinnamon dessert pizza! – This place is anything but ordinary. The pizza’s worth the wait, and there’s no need to order extra cheese. Trust us, they’ve got you covered with cheese. – Follow Eric's lead, and get the Farouk Special. Trust us on this one. – Located in a converted former doctor’s office, Perillo’s is a small-town gem owned by a former chef from Sicily. Try the garlic rolls! Cash only. – Once you’re seated, don’t be alarmed by the red phone – that’s how you order! – You have to try their famous Campfire pizza- it’s made with smoked sausage, sweet onion marmalade, gorgonzola and fresh rosemary. – Authentic Italian food with a unique family story! You can enjoy incredible pizza made from scratch, made the same way the original Rocco made it in 1951. – We don’t know what’s in their secret sauce but we do know that it’s delicious. – Incredible community atmosphere and great food — what’s not to like! – Pizza and beer. That’s all we have to say. Did we miss your favorite Indiana pizza joint? We’ll add it to the list! Happy pizza eating!
