name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: why I support Margaret
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20644758/257798331/-940294256?refcode=101920-es-gillibrand-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWNhYjQxMi1hNjE0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNO3cptP_-XepvX9xaJ_lOoanfb2DX3Cade2QF-_ggw=&emci=86961f12-0d14-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=69cab412-a614-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)

Friend,

My name is Kirsten Gillibrand. I’m one of New York’s United States Senators, a mom, and founder of Off the Sidelines, a group that works to help women and girls across the country get off the sidelines and make a difference in their communities.

Margaret Good epitomizes these values. She’s made a real difference in the Florida State House, and she will continue to do so in Congress.

**[Will you chip in today and join me on Team Margaret?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20644760/257798333/1073285021?refcode2=69cab412-a614-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=86961f12-0d14-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=69cab412-a614-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=101920-es-gillibrand-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWNhYjQxMi1hNjE0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNO3cptP_-XepvX9xaJ_lOoanfb2DX3Cade2QF-_ggw=)**

If we are going to elect another strong woman to Congress in Margaret Good and flip this district, we need to show her that we have her back. Margaret is up against an entrenched opponent who is backed by wealthy special interests.

**[Please, join me and pitch in whatever you can afford to show that grassroots strength can flip this district and elect a true champion for the Suncoast in Margaret Good.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20644762/257798335/1073285021?refcode2=69cab412-a614-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=86961f12-0d14-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=69cab412-a614-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=101920-es-gillibrand-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWNhYjQxMi1hNjE0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNO3cptP_-XepvX9xaJ_lOoanfb2DX3Cade2QF-_ggw=)**

We need Margaret and the values she represents in Congress.

Thanks for all you do,

Kirsten Gillibrand
US Senator, New York

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20644764/257798337/1073285021?refcode2=69cab412-a614-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=86961f12-0d14-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=69cab412-a614-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=101920-es-gillibrand-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWNhYjQxMi1hNjE0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNO3cptP_-XepvX9xaJ_lOoanfb2DX3Cade2QF-_ggw=)

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! name: =?utf-8?Q?Patrick=20Kibbe?=
subject: The Q3 fundraising numbers have been released...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
No surprises there: Jackie is still being bankrolled by her lobbyist friends. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=38a375e4ea&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ca1f168081&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
Dear Friend,

The FEC fundraising reports for all candidates were made public this week. No surprise, Jackie is still being bankrolled by her lobbyist friends.

---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3dee59bff5&e=5886ca081d "CONTRIBUTE")
---
|
Less than half of Jackie’s contributions for Quarter 3, which ran from July 1 through Sept. 30, were from individual donors. Only 40 percent of her reported contributions were from Indiana. Who do you think Jackie listens to? Not you. Not the people of IN02.

Corporate special interests are killing our democracy. In order to save our democracy, we must achieve comprehensive campaign finance reform. Money in politics has rendered Congress stagnant and ineffective in response to people’s demand for responsible laws on education, health care, the environment, gun violence prevention, the privatization of our prisons, protecting and expanding Social Security and Medicare, and rebuilding and modernizing our national infrastructure. Our ability to enact laws in the interest of the people is limited when policymakers listen to corrupt corporate interests rather than the people they are supposed to represent.

---
| **If we all give a little, we can do a lot.**

_[Express Donate $10](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=35d034153a&e=5886ca081d)_
_[Express Donate $25](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=601268f20f&e=5886ca081d)_
_[Express Donate $50](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=57b859a1cf&e=5886ca081d)_
_[Or Donate another amount](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=088bba3a6d&e=5886ca081d)_
---
|

Pat refuses to accept corporate PAC contributions. Pat is committed to reducing the influence of special interest groups in Washington and is dedicated to restoring the House of Representatives as the People’s House.

Jackie, on the other hand, is using corporate PAC money to run as many television ads as possible between now and the election. We’re countering her lies and misinformation that she uses to prey on people’s fears by revealing the truth about Jackie’s hypocrisy and dereliction of duty. [_**But we need your help.**_](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=defedbe141&e=5886ca081d)

---
| [INVEST IN TEAM HACKETT](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=70525ac2bc&e=5886ca081d "INVEST IN TEAM HACKETT")
---
|
Let’s show Jackie that a people-powered campaign can defeat special interests. Let’s show Jackie that we will not be silenced. Let’s show Jackie that the people of IN02 are ready for a change.

Thank you for your ongoing support,
Patrick
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c66b609fe4&e=5886ca081d)
---
[ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=61b05c73ff&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | | | | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=fb41583578&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=13ca5fb017&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=4e84219d56&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5cbb758d35&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.
---
| Pat Hackett for CongressPO Box 8066South Bend, IN 46660-8066
[Add us to your address book](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8f9c8d9378)

name: True the Vote
subject: NEW Podcast: Pray, Work, Vote!
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=276A616A20A2753)
---
| | |
---
| | This week on Red White & True News... Pray, Work, Vote!
---
| | In the latest episode of the [Red White & True News podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=276A616A20A2764), True the Vote Founder Catherine Engelbrecht revisits her very first podcast back in May 2020 with True the Vote General Counsel Jim Bopp and looks back at our past predictions – many of which are playing out right now in this election.

Back in May, many said these problems and fraud were just related to the primary election. Today, we have seen widespread issues beyond just mail, but also the removal of signature verification standards, the removal of postmark standards, vote harvesting, the striking down of voter ID provisions in certain states, and more. It's been a free-for-all to the tune of over 400 lawsuits – that is staggering! Catherine highlights several states like Montana, where True the Vote has taken legal action, and points out ways that citizens can help us push back with Election Day right around the corner. Pray, Work, Vote!

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=276A616A20A2764)
---
| | Check out our new launch of [Pray the Vote](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=276A616A20A2765) – the largest interactive election prayer initiative in history. Over 5 million Americans have prayed over the election so far!

This week, we also launched an [Election Integrity Hotline](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=276A616A20A2766) – a 24/7, bilingual resource to support election workers, poll watchers, and voters during this unprecedented time – which you can reach at 855-702-0702. This hotline is in addition to our [Election Integrity Report](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=276A616A20A2768) which you can also always access on our website. We encourage you to either fill out the report or call our hotline if you've witnessed election fraud or manipulation.

Click below to listen or [watch a video of the podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=276A616A20A2764) on our YouTube page.

---

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: What Chris Wallace and Susan Page did wrong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Watch this before tonight's debate.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=3865%2E53494%2E1kHix5) Friend, For a baffling 12 years, debate moderators ignored the growing climate crisis. But there's good news: This fall -- thanks in large part to advocacy across the climate movement -- the crisis has come up two for two in the presidential and vice presidential debates. NBC's Kristen Welker, moderator of the third and final presidential debate, has already committed to asking about climate as one of six topics in tonight's debate. (And President Trump has already tried to thwart this plan to avoid talking about his disastrous record on climate.) That's the good news. The bad news is that the first two debate moderators, Chris Wallace and Susan Page, framed their questions in the exact wrong ways. Moderators have an immense opportunity and duty: When they do their jobs well, American voters get to reap the benefits of being well-informed on their way to the ballot box. And when they don't? Well, we're living with those consequences now. **That's why we put together a video with NowThis to share the dos and don'ts of asking candidates about climate change. We can put pressure on the press to get this issue right, and we can educate ourselves to know the difference.** **[Watch and share our video with NowThis before the final presidential debate of 2020.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1064?t=3&akid=3865%2E53494%2E1kHix5)** When Wallace brought up the climate crisis in the first debate, it took me by surprise -- especially since the topic was noticeably absent from his initial agenda. But it shouldn't have surprised me. As we look toward an election of immeasurable consequence to ourselves and our planet, we can -- and should -- expect better. We should expect more questions, framed in ways that nod to the indisputable reality of the crisis -- and not as something to believe in or agree with. We should expect moderators to avoid setting candidates up with a false choice between good jobs and a clean environment. We should expect conversations that take the costs of inaction into account -- because they are far greater than the costs of action. **[Watch and share our video with NowThis to spread the word about the importance of asking pointed questions about the climate crisis at tonight's debate.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1064?t=4&akid=3865%2E53494%2E1kHix5)** Thanks, Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action | [WATCH AND SHARE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1064?t=5&akid=3865%2E53494%2E1kHix5)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=3865%2E53494%2E1kHix5). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump’s Greatest Accomplishments Are What He Hasn’t Done
body:
Whether it’s not seizing power when nearly all other executives have, some of President Trump’s greatest accomplishments are what he hasn’t done | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=015df3eaaf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump’s Greatest Accomplishments Are What He Hasn’t Done**

“Under immense pressure by the media and other Democratic operatives, at a time when nearly all global leaders were using the pandemic as an excuse to seize greater control, Trump did not,” Mollie Hemingway writes in _The Federalist_.

“Whether it’s not seizing power at a time nearly all other executives have, not launching wars in the manner of his predecessors, or not ignoring the campaign promises he made, some of President Donald Trump’s greatest accomplishments are what he hasn’t done.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=02bc664071&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Across the globe, the [Chinese Communist Party] aims to spread propaganda, restrict speech, and exploit personal data to malign ends. The United States, accordingly, cannot simply ignore the CCP’s ideological objectives. Washington must understand that the fight against Chinese aggression first requires recognizing it and defending ourselves against it,” National Security Advisor Robert O’Brien writes for [_Foreign Affairs_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56f7c3f81c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump often says that his ‘America First’ foreign policy does not mean ‘America Alone.’ Nowhere is this better exemplified than in the new United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement . . . [USMCA] replaces the outdated, ineffective North American Trade Agreement (NAFTA) and better positions the American economy and its private sector for success,” Deputy Energy Secretary Mark Menezes writes in [_Townhall_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b5c7622c9d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Americans expect their air, water, and land to be clean. In the Trump Administration, the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency is intently focused on meeting these expectations. This focus has paid off. Since 2017, criteria air pollutant emissions have fallen 7 percent, making air quality the best it’s been since modern recordkeeping began,” Assistant EPA Administrator Susan Bodine writes for [_RealClearEnergy_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a40cf7641&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b95a5e39f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd61876183&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=eafff720cb)

name: Team Warner
subject: Why are you voting in this election?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We're asking Virginians what motivates them to vote.
|
---

| | | Derek,

**In Virginia, we like to say that every year is the most important election, but this year, that 's really true.** This election is about who we are -- and who we want to be -- as a Commonwealth and as a country.

With more than a million votes cast already in the Commonwealth, one thing is clear: Virginians are ready to vote. **[With that in mind, will you take our one-question survey about why _**you 're**_ voting in this election? If you've already voted early in person or by mail, we'd like to hear from you too!](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da01/53d9897e/554770ed/1c88fa94/2275697736/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-why")** Thank you for your support!
-- Team Warner

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Join Our Get Out The Vote Super Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

This weekend is the last weekend of early voting, and we need your help to energize voters throughout Texas' 7th District to get Wesley across the finish line!

**Join us this Saturday for our Team Hunt Get Out The Vote (GOTV) Super Saturday, with events ranging from block walks and phone banks to rallies throughout our community.**

We have the opportunity to bring urgently needed change to the 7th District, but in order to do so, we need to make sure every Team Hunt supporter goes to the polls and votes! Residents throughout our community can cast their votes _**today**_.

Start the day off block walking and phone banking at 10:00am at our Team Hunt Headquarters, located at 11511 Katy Freeway, Suite 105.

Next, start your afternoon with Wesley and Representative Jim Murphy as they rally voters at Nottingham Park at 12:00pm.

Then, be sure to join Wesley and candidate Lacey Hull for a Get Out The Vote Rally at 2:00pm at ISGH Bear Creek Community Center.

Election Day is just 12 days away; help us get out the vote and bring new leadership to 7th District!

To participate in our GOTV Super Saturday, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com.

Thank you,
Team Hunt

clean_body: Friend, This weekend is the last weekend of early voting, and we need your help to energize voters throughout Texas' 7th District to get Wesley across the finish line! Join us this Saturday for our Team Hunt Get Out The Vote (GOTV) Super Saturday, with events ranging from block walks and phone banks to rallies throughout our community. We have the opportunity to bring urgently needed change to the 7th District, but in order to do so, we need to make sure every Team Hunt supporter goes to the polls and votes! Residents throughout our community can cast their votes today. Start the day off block walking and phone banking at 10:00am at our Team Hunt Headquarters, located at 11511 Katy Freeway, Suite 105. Next, start your afternoon with Wesley and Representative Jim Murphy as they rally voters at Nottingham Park at 12:00pm. Then, be sure to join Wesley and candidate Lacey Hull for a Get Out The Vote Rally at 2:00pm at ISGH Bear Creek Community Center. Election Day is just 12 days away; help us get out the vote and bring new leadership to 7th District! To participate in our GOTV Super Saturday, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com. Thank you, Team Hunt **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

body:
Let's set the record straight

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c33/7f51f7bc/46c6463e/4efbc2eb/2184532036/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
Peter --

Sen. Cornyn is running a television ad about his record on health care that's earned him FOUR Pinocchios from _The Washington Post 's_ fact checker. (That means it's a complete lie!)

As they put it --
"His Senate record speaks for itself: numerous votes to repeal the Affordable Care Act or replace it with weaker tea; a pair of proposals that could saddle sick patients with higher, and possibly prohibitive, costs; and voting against a measure just last month that would have barred the Justice Department from arguing to strike down the entire health-care law in court."
We've GOT to make sure that Texans are getting the truth about Sen. Cornyn, not just his televised lies. **[Will you pitch in to help us get the truth out about Sen. Cornyn's health care record? ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c33/7f51f7bc/46c6463e/4efbc2ea/2184532036/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzNTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201022.2nd__2358__&amount=10")**

[**Keep Long Island Safe!**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=c8a252b09b934ae49e92b1c41ff086aa&_e=XzYnVNk78RVoydcvkoqEL4pxi2Q3koVC8484eL5H8vcUbxUeADjK2c7jFxqFbRhrQ5ALbPxoY_GMzUbHaGsCcgznj3XWjYhO7wnMuyKtd0ocOng_9Mtg4VcH7NzzBjeWeFWEm331se3L_VohAVNFsEaL7__01agaj9egEUF79O4dX_L6SJ8dLM8LNyDE1VblGTfYfZQmphVQ7cHuZpb1YMNITWm9ngd4hkc84cQqd4qoZe7XQwbcmXuGNoHjhPKuELDS0jVAVorWdqR3q8fp1H50xHuaYECf16qjYEkQ_9tEUaPYUuxjAj2UPjU5yABc9i6LMI4tAul9cZKbGYN6E5RcnlWqo16PXvnQNk9j6GRxWn-eA3LCL_IpD_hJybxEXK4KB6jWQu_uVIj5_PM8yC4ve3n0MtPk25FgmKUFjSK67frGFdqfuCoTIBFk2Npo)
**_Nancy Pelosi. _**

**_AOC._**

**_Bill de Blasio._**

**_Jackie Gordon. _**

Do you know what they all have in common?

All of them are members of the _**RADICAL LEFT**_ , and all of them are planning to defund and abandon our police if they win this November! They want to cut funds for our police, including for life-saving equipment like bullet-proof vests!

In a matter of months, Democrats have undone the decades of police work and economic growth that made New York _**SAFE**_ , _**SUCCESSFUL**_ , & _**STRONG!** _Now they want to implement those same _**RADICAL POLICIES**_ right here on Long Island with the help of Jackie Gordon!
[**Keep Long Island Safe!**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=c8a252b09b934ae49e92b1c41ff086aa&_e=XzYnVNk78RVoydcvkoqEL4pxi2Q3koVC8484eL5H8vcUbxUeADjK2c7jFxqFbRhrQ5ALbPxoY_GMzUbHaGsCcgznj3XWjYhO7wnMuyKtd0ocOng_9Mtg4VcH7NzzBjeWeFWEm331se3L_VohAVNFsEaL7__01agaj9egEUF79O4dX_L6SJ8dLM8LNyDE1VblGTfYfZQmphVQ7cHuZpb1YMNITWm9ngd4hkc84cQqd4pafrmPkcF_Vrjk_KEsk1VLguemJS1aU4csJoan7vnjlAIBWqW_-lZQxAZ_NHaZeDbCMfKDF2n76wu0hrVBW7cbDfVoEvf0rDM-inS0lHyAeHAnm46IUizgtggWs8uwS6Bv5N_2zqXtYaxyArTqEqVYmNHBkiPtWR6Izm14AIImHjRXWoEn2kQnjDP23_obDfKKizExWEqJ0_P9RPnn3Mcx)
**Radical politicians like Bill de Blasio, Jackie Gordon, and AOC continue to advocate for policies that have made New York the most dangerous and unsafe it’s been in decades! **

**We can’t let that come to Long Island; I won’t let it happen!**

That’s why we need to protect our community of Long Island and ensure it remains a place that backs the blue and believes in law and order, **not radical left violence!** I’m calling on the people of Long Island to help me keep Long Island safe! **[Peter, will you chip in $5, $25, or even $75 to KEEP LONG ISLAND SAFE from the RADICAL LEFT?](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=c8a252b09b934ae49e92b1c41ff086aa&_e=XzYnVNk78RVoydcvkoqEL4pxi2Q3koVC8484eL5H8vcUbxUeADjK2c7jFxqFbRhrQ5ALbPxoY_GMzUbHaGsCcgznj3XWjYhO7wnMuyKtd0ocOng_9Mtg4VcH7NzzBjeWeFWEm331se3L_VohAVNFsEaL7__01agaj9egEUF79O4dX_L6SJ8dLM8LNyDE1VblGTfYfZQmphVQ7cHuZpb1YMNITWm9ngd4hkc84cQqd4pXexiAF8Iag0BYaSkHmNjS8mMJAKaMe9M-KUshzYnWWm7Uu9Ff0nyu0-Y498XqPuZrtH-dpkjNZXiJcvxjbkIoXhfqkn3nG9YyhALIwrNoGAJBpQpYOSdfVBr0BUi7V3AAt2FBCYpnyuPCU8P4WIbRGrN8h25Fx87VoB69CM2G7HyKmPsGGIEpuyL-t8LC9Dv9KKHbCOnx9WThZ108_hbW)**

name: Team Stanton
subject: The Superspreader Rally In Tucson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Every time Donald Trump holds a rally in our state, he puts thousands of Arizonans at risk. Trump's event in Tucson on Monday was irresponsible, dangerous, and it likely led to serious infections throughout our state. The President contracted the virus at his White House event and not only is he actively campaigning, he's condemning science, and encouraging people to join him despite the risks.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/DAfwOnLnTV873wTgApw2Ep1MqxEfQfeJy2YXKU_AR7I=/FrzNuhQ84Vdlqt_DUZibU-x0af2fYqAxMIWAdnAE1r0=)

At this point Trump is _mocking_ Arizonans who are trying to protect others and minimize the risk of transmitting this deadly virus.

**[We need to elect leaders like Greg who will listen to the experts, follow science, and refuse to put Americans in harm's way. Can you help make sure Greg has the resources necessary to finish strong and fight back against the attacks?](https://act.myngp.com/el/DAfwOnLnTV873wTgApw2Ep1MqxEfQfeJy2YXKU_AR7I=/pS0V_o0_q57e2ub0XJ438_A06Zfos8Dp-WexLrGSsUQ=?refcode=X_102020_TrumpinAZ_A)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Governor=20Terry=20Branstad?=
subject: Who are the leaders up to the task?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| As I’ve been travelling across the state on the campaign trail, I’ve had the chance to share with Iowans the experiences I had over the past few years as Ambassador to China.

Americans are worried about the threat posed by the Chinese Communist Party – about their spying, their military buildup, their unfair trade practices, and their coverup of the COVID-19 outbreak that has cost American lives; and what I tell them is that we have nothing to fear, so long as America elects the right leaders.
---
| [Contribute Here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=840a81a884&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Contribute Here")
---
| If we vote wisely and choose leaders with toughness, experience, and intelligence, America will remain the most powerful, prosperous nation in the world, capable of handling the threat posed by the Chinese Communists and maintaining order on the global stage.

There are two leaders right here in Iowa that I believe, from dealing with them personally, are perfect candidates to take on this challenge and lead America fearlessly into the future.

Senator Randy Feenstra and Senator Mariannette Miller-Meeks are both experienced, seasoned, and serious leaders. I’ve had the opportunity to work with them both, and I have the utmost faith in them and their capacity to deliver effective, meaningful results – especially with regard to the most serious challenges facing America on the world stage.

So, consider this is a call to action – our state and our country need leaders like Senator Feenstra and Senator Miller-Meeks, and they need your help. Consider supporting them by contributing $20, $30, $50, or any amount you can give to their campaigns so they can mobilize the support needed to win on November 3rd and lead America and Iowa to a secure and prosperous future.
---
| [Click here to lend your support!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=6af578eb35&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to lend your support!")
---
| Sincerely,

_Governor Terry Branstad_
---
|
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
| Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323

Joe Biden and Kamala Harris just visited Nevada to discuss their plans to make healthcare more affordable, clean up our environment, create an economy for working-class families, and implement a comprehensive, national response to the pandemic.
**_But all of this is at stake if Donald Trump takes the lead, folks._**
The GOP has had their eyes on flipping Nevada from the very beginning:
\-- Donald Trump’s first campaign office outside of DC opened up in Reno

subject: Can President Trump Count on you to work for him for the next 13 days?
body:
|

Stampede America has partnered with the Trump Campaign to deploy a team of Trump Supporters who can knock on doors and mobilize conservative to vote in the November 3 election. Canvassers will receive compensation of $25-$35/hr. Must be willing to travel to a battleground state. Travel and hotel stipend provided.
| [](https://stampedecampaings.com/stam/index.php/campaigns/wh537czbbvbfd/track-url/pt474o9lkkf4f/ba946849c8aef64b877716ce587ec9352567025c)

Holly Turner

For more information and to see other job opportunities, visit [www.stampedeamerica.com](https://stampedecampaings.com/stam/index.php/campaigns/wh537czbbvbfd/track-url/pt474o9lkkf4f/78d212ecce2ff3306c8f6ccb2082015604a67128)

name: Sean Grier
subject: It's not too late to RSVP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
RSVP today!
|
---

| | We have less than 20 days to maintain the House majority, flip the U.S. Senate, and elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House. All of this is possible with voter turnout in North Carolina's 6th Congressional District! Majority Leader Steny H. Hoyer understands just how important North Carolina is this Fall and has set aside time to join us for a special virtual reception in support of Kathy Manning's campaign. Here are the facts:
* Kathy isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money.
* The Republicans are pumping millions of dollars into North Carolina to help elect Trump and his allies.
* Kathy's race is one of the top pick up opportunities in the country this year.

We'll be honest, the crisis at the United States Postal Service, the coronavirus pandemic, and the economic uncertainty facing our communities, highlight the need for strong leaders like Kathy Manning who can work to build consensus, protect our families, and get things done for North Carolinians. **Join Kathy Manning and Majority Leader Steny H. Hoyer for a special virtual event as we work to flip North Carolina blue! ** [_**Click here to RSVP!**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d217/3d199a51/2f81dd9d/73649aed/1864217737/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmhoyer20") Below, you'll find our invitation. Even if you cannot attend, please chip in to our efforts today. [](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d217/3d199a51/2f81dd9d/73649aed/1864217737/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmhoyer20") We are looking forward to (virtually!) seeing you soon! Sean Grier Finance Director [**Click here to RSVP.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d217/3d199a51/2f81dd9d/73649aed/1864217737/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmhoyer20") **For more information contact Sean@KathyManningForNC.com** |
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

---

subject: This changes everything, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eastman for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Peter, I was just alerted to some disturbing news:

Starting TODAY the GOP is launching a **[$792,510](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8a0/77d4c309/221d63e7/2635bcf5/2320216942/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201020_em_fr_b1_cuf_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** ad blitz to annihilate my lead in these final days.

I'm going to pull back the curtain a bit -- because this is too important:

[**_To counter their attacks I need to run a combination of Digital and TV ads that expose their lies to voters across the district. For this to work, I have to ramp up our spending TODAY. And need your help raising $17,289 to cover it. Will you rush $5? >>_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8a0/77d4c309/221d63e7/2635bcf5/2320216942/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201020_em_fr_b1_cuf_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I'll be honest, Peter: _This wave of false attacks has completely blindsided us._

The GOP knows how close this race is -- they only have to convince a handful of voters to tip the scales.

At this very moment, voters watching CNN and NBC are being pummeled with ads and every minute I'm unable to fight back is devastating.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

name: John Carney
subject: We need Bethany Hall-Long on our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/58v7lT_-9YQZxKOtMMQFlQ==/HNvhDMUq0YgbDAsgDWLxUA==?refcode=2020-10-carney)
---

Friend,

Over the last four years, I've had the privilege to serve with our Lieutenant Governor, Bethany Hall-Long.

[**[WATCH VIDEO] Support Lieutenant Governor Bethany Hall-Long**](https://act.myngp.com/el/58v7lT_-9YQZxKOtMMQFlQ==/P0-t0pvTp0cOzX7W0dvfzQ==)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/58v7lT_-9YQZxKOtMMQFlQ==/P0-t0pvTp0cOzX7W0dvfzQ==)

[**_Donate to Bethany Hall-Long 's re-election campaign._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/58v7lT_-9YQZxKOtMMQFlQ==/HNvhDMUq0YgbDAsgDWLxUA==?refcode=2020-10-carney)

As a public health nurse and professor of nursing, Bethany has been instrumental in our response to COVID-19.

Bethany **co-chaired the Pandemic Resurgence Advisory Committee** so that we are prepared for the future. And she led the state's effort to help homeless Delawareans have a place to safely take shelter when COVID hit.

As Chair of the Behavioral Health Consortium, Bethany works with experts and advocates to **help Delawareans battling addiction and substance use disorders**.

**We need Bethany on our team to keep working together to build a stronger, healthier Delaware. **

[**Please support Bethany Hall-Long 's re-election campaign by donating what you can.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/58v7lT_-9YQZxKOtMMQFlQ==/HNvhDMUq0YgbDAsgDWLxUA==?refcode=2020-10-carney)

In a second term, I know that Bethany will continue to improve the health and well-being of all Delawareans.

Thanks for your continued support.

John

subject: I back them, they back me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|

Friend, I have proudly supported our brave law enforcement officers - and I am proud to say they support me. I now have the endorsement of the NYS Troopers PBA, the NYS Troopers Investigators Association, and the Police Conference of New York. They have all endorsed me because they know I support our police officers, and I will continue to do so in Congress. Right now, we need leaders in office who will stand by our brave law enforcement officers and who will fight for them every single day as they keep our communities safe - and my opponent and his radical friends will not do that. With me in office, Western New Yorkers can be assured that they have a leader who will fight for law and order, public safety, our brave men and woman in uniform - you have my word. Will you stand with me and dedicated patriots all across the country in defending our law enforcement - we need you to join us and stop the radical 'defund the police' movement in its tracks. We need you to defend our brave law enforcement; together, we will make sure we back our blue and support them for years to come. Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/dRbkesQqIgIFu5AWLI6ODA/cR72RHv8Pge9exhkbOmiBg)

## **CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT 36 PRESS RELEASE**
October 22, 2020 Just Released: The California Narcotics Officers' Association* has unanimously endorsed Erin Cruz for United States Congress in the 36th District. In their letter to Mrs. Cruz, they state, "This endorsement is offered due to your belief in the enforcement of narcotic laws and support of all law enforcement in general, but also because of your passion for your community, in making it a safer place to live and work." In response to the endorsement, Erin Cruz put out a statement, "I am humbled and honored to accept the unanimous endorsement from the CNOA. We must restore law and order so our children and future generations can enjoy the same simple pleasures we did when we were young. Thank you, CNOA for your confidence in my ability to represent the people of the 36th Congressional District in California." *The California Narcotic Officers' Association is dedicated to providing high quality training for law enforcement professionals. Since 1964, CNOA has grown to become the largest non-profit Training Association in California, with over 7,000 members. Our members include: local, state, and federal peace officers, prosecutors, law enforcement personnel, and other national and international associates. For 56 years, CNOA has offered the finest training available in all areas of narcotic enforcement activities to the dedicated men and women who are our first line of defense against the proliferation of illegal drugs in our state. To learn more about Erin Cruz for Congress go to erincruz.org **###**
---

I am confident that the Senate Judiciary Committee will vote to advance Judge Amy Coney Barrett's nomination on Thursday. But the full Senate will not be voting until Monday! | [](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTM3ODAyMTE0ODMzNTg2MDIzJmM9aDZvOCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzY5NDg4NzkmZD13MGk3cDJo.jLY_ay1kjV12S6WsfEWRgPfEr7bR0t6PrGI3i2Wypsk)

| Hi , I met with Judge Amy Coney Barrett this week and the Senate Judiciary Committee has voted to advance her nomination to the full Senate. **But the full Senate will not be voting until Monday!** That gives moderate Republican Senators the whole weekend to rethink whether or not they will be voting to confirm. [**I will be working tirelessly this weekend to lobby those Senators to support ACB's confirmation. Help me win them over with a quick $30 donation to my campaign.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTM3ODAyMTE0ODMzNTg2MDIzJmM9aDZvOCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzY5NDg4OTEmZD11OG4wYTJ3.3sV1Ji7ms_fHsXrseYzwrhgXPqC9wdXfpcCtS6dBBqg)

| The moderates are keeping their cards close to their chests. They have not let anyone in the party know how they will be voting. **I cannot overstate the importance of confirming another originalist judge to the Supreme Court.** This is our opportunity to cement a true conservative majority on the court, and it’s insurance for us against any single justice who might decide to side with the liberals on any given case. [**I am working to convince all Republican Senators to vote for ACB, and I need your support to keep me going. Send our campaign a one time donation of $45 right now.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTM3ODAyMTE0ODMzNTg2MDIzJmM9aDZvOCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzY5NDg5MDMmZD1sNWw3eTZk.tTtIOFjC62DZ_kYb0a22rUj9VkQwcWA4kpeQC1PWq6U)

name: Betsy
subject: Level Red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Governor DeWine's announcement today shows just how badly COVID is surging in Northeast Ohio. For the first time, all three counties in my district are now under threat level 3, RED, the second highest threat level. There's concern that Portage County is teetering on the most dire purple level. Sadly, many Republican political "leaders" in this District have not been taking COVID-19 seriously - ignoring their own Republican Governor and driving our Public Health Director from her job. In fact, my opponent wants to restrict public health authority and has continued to blatantly ignore public health directives -- _even criticizing me personally for not talking with voters at their doors and bragging about how he doesn 't wear a mask because people want to see his face. Ignoring the rules, not caring about the health of those around him, _** he proudly refuses to wear a mask in public **(see the sampling of photos he proudly posts on his Facebook page below) [****](https://act.myngp.com/el/nkZvQSoI29zD9V3u4J-nnPp1rYL7hy6Wm7OjjO4UACQ=/1yY4CcddNBcaJs91UXx4eAyNs742AACxFTIzqqT9UfI=?refcode=10.22) Our lives are literally at stake in this election. My opponent's disregard for science, medical expertise, health and safety is dangerous, and his addition to an anti-science Republican legislature endangers Ohio citizens. He's supported by a group that resists even basic childhood immunizations and won't listen to his own Governor to take even the most basic steps to protect our health and our economy. I've worked at the Cleveland Clinic and Medicare and Medicaid. I respect science and medical expertise. I know what it takes for us to come together to tackle the pandemic while getting Ohioans back on their feet. [Please chip in today to help us compete with the RSCC's half a million dollar attack ads for my opponent. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/nkZvQSoI29zD9V3u4J-nnPp1rYL7hy6Wm7OjjO4UACQ=/1yY4CcddNBcaJs91UXx4eAyNs742AACxFTIzqqT9UfI=?refcode=10.22)** ** This is not a time for extremist politics. This is a time to work together for a safe and healthy future. clean_body: | | | | Governor DeWine's announcement today shows just how badly COVID is surging in Northeast Ohio. For the first time, all three counties in my district are now under threat level 3, RED, the second highest threat level. There's concern that Portage County is teetering on the most dire purple level. Sadly, many Republican political "leaders" in this District have not been taking COVID-19 seriously - ignoring their own Republican Governor and driving our Public Health Director from her job. In fact, my opponent wants to restrict public health authority and has continued to blatantly ignore public health directives -- even criticizing me personally for not talking with voters at their doors and bragging about how he doesn 't wear a mask because people want to see his face. Ignoring the rules, not caring about the health of those around him, he proudly refuses to wear a mask in public (see the sampling of photos he proudly posts on his Facebook page below) Our lives are literally at stake in this election. My opponent's disregard for science, medical expertise, health and safety is dangerous, and his addition to an anti-science Republican legislature endangers Ohio citizens. He's supported by a group that resists even basic childhood immunizations and won't listen to his own Governor to take even the most basic steps to protect our health and our economy. I've worked at the Cleveland Clinic and Medicare and Medicaid. I respect science and medical expertise. I know what it takes for us to come together to tackle the pandemic while getting Ohioans back on their feet. This is not a time for extremist politics. This is a time to work together for a safe and healthy future. Sincerely, = = = = | Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader Friends of Betsy Rader 626 Franklin Ave PO Box #801 Kent OH 44240 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =

name: Christy Smith
subject: We can't lose the momentum we've built in these last 12 days. We have to extend our lead over Mike Garcia. If you're in this fight all the way to the end -- like I am -- please chip in right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

I'm thrilled about the newest poll of our race in CA-25. **If you haven't heard, it has us _up_ by two points over Mike Garcia!**

This is a _huge_ testament to the momentum in this movement we've built. And it proves that we're in a position to come out on top in November.

But here's the thing: Mike also posted a **_two-to-one_** fundraising advantage from the last quarter. He's going into these final days with more resources at his disposal -- his corporate PAC donors are all-in to hold on to this seat and make sure they still have a rubber stamp on their agenda in Congress. Every day he is adding to his TV reservations, and right now, we don't have the resources to fight back.

**[Peter, we have to raise our game. We need to close this fundraising gap _fast_ \-- and I'm relying on folks like you for support. Please, click here to rush a donation of $5 or more today. ](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bff2/29776869/8c9dc0e/569dd199/2122262611/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMjJfY3Nwb2xsX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201022_cspoll_in")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bff2/29776869/8c9dc0e/569dd19a/2122262611/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMjJfY3Nwb2xsX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201022_cspoll_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $22.44](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bff2/29776869/8c9dc0e/569dd19b/2122262611/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMjJfY3Nwb2xsX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201022_cspoll_in&express_lane=true&amount=22.44")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bff2/29776869/8c9dc0e/569dd194/2122262611/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMjJfY3Nwb2xsX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201022_cspoll_in&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bff2/29776869/8c9dc0e/569dd195/2122262611/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMjJfY3Nwb2xsX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201022_cspoll_in&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bff2/29776869/8c9dc0e/569dd196/2122262611/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMjJfY3Nwb2xsX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201022_cspoll_in&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bff2/29776869/8c9dc0e/569dd199/2122262611/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMjJfY3Nwb2xsX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201022_cspoll_in")
I _know_ that we can win this race if we all pull together -- and it means so much to have you with me. We've built a grassroots team that can take on _anyone_ \-- even Mike and his corporate PAC donors.

We can't lose the momentum we've built in these last 12 days. We have to extend our lead over Mike Garcia (right now, we're still in what the pollsters call "the margin of error"), decrease his fundraising advantage, and ensure that every last Democratic voter in the district returns their ballot by November 3rd.

**[If you're in this fight all the way to the end -- like I am -- please chip in $5 or more right now.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bff2/29776869/8c9dc0e/569dd199/2122262611/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMjJfY3Nwb2xsX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201022_cspoll_in")**

Thanks,

Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bff2/29776869/8c9dc0e/569dd199/2122262611/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMjJfY3Nwb2xsX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201022_cspoll_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bff2/29776869/8c9dc0e/569dd199/2122262611/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMjJfY3Nwb2xsX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201022_cspoll_in")

#
This district is home to 54,000 union members.

**Organized labor is the backbone of so much of our local economy** , and I always say that organized labor is one of the most effective mechanisms we have for bridging the huge chasm between corporations and their wealthy CEOs and the everyday working people who prop up their profits.

When I am elected to Congress (_in less than two weeks!_) it will be with the support not just of the unions who’ve endorsed my candidacy, but of the thousands of members who’ve rallied behind me. **When I am elected to Congress, it will be with union members by my side. **

name: Gina Raimondo
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We reached a milestone today in our state's response to COVID-19: we've run our one millionth test.
It took us nearly six months from our first case to reach 500,000 tests, and it's only taken us another two months to reach 1,000,000. This kind of testing capacity is only possible thanks to the hard work of thousands of frontline healthcare workers, state employees, and members of the National Guard. I'm grateful to them for their continued efforts to keep Rhode Island safe.
Because of this unprecedented testing effort, we've been able to quickly identify and isolate positive cases. That's more important than ever right now, as our cases are increasing and we're at a a crucial crossroads in combatting this virus. If we recommit ourselves to the 3Ws: wearing a mask, watching our distance and washing our hands, and get tested frequently -- even if we don't have any symptoms -- then we can stem the tide of our rising case numbers and avoid a second wave before it gets worse. It won't be easy, but I know that we can do it together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X8OP7BUVMeuny-rDb8tb242fAh-mNw61uyGl957j6Fzzlg9bukmE9AJAmjnSljjlT_6FvWTNWH1nkSwcz59Z3nytKNPDjGrz1cCMz40qaESOYkxlK8-orOO9D0Kq681-3paHIwQLla2ndogs96ek873emAH9g0N-H_-cdHXZ3AOeaZhe0HyiOtRv71YepCoMaejsNeLfB1gEtggVRjS5ZU7tHGJH2InjBiyZ9XD_owfwOBia8RIl6AjPxoSccB6nZ12W-r1pPXo3iG8BIPISIlw8mp5u1UNWDk4HYgHz1gmH8IWFvEWdN_u9iGJ202_QTUb0KsqF3nw=&c=ph7viGp-MS6D7XxNrVizfwxu4dHtYzIr52uizicumxIcEQlEvIkQqw==&ch=hkASWMaowW1vrIEN07upcpaU_KvBSMoLpkWScigETTL8urPbBFu8JA==).

clean_body: | | | | | | | Hello friend, We reached a milestone today in our state's response to COVID-19: we've run our one millionth test. It took us nearly six months from our first case to reach 500,000 tests, and it's only taken us another two months to reach 1,000,000. This kind of testing capacity is only possible thanks to the hard work of thousands of frontline healthcare workers, state employees, and members of the National Guard. I'm grateful to them for their continued efforts to keep Rhode Island safe. Because of this unprecedented testing effort, we've been able to quickly identify and isolate positive cases. That's more important than ever right now, as our cases are increasing and we're at a a crucial crossroads in combatting this virus. If we recommit ourselves to the 3Ws: wearing a mask, watching our distance and washing our hands, and get tested frequently -- even if we don't have any symptoms -- then we can stem the tide of our rising case numbers and avoid a second wave before it gets worse. It won't be easy, but I know that we can do it together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: Mark Warner
subject: How I'm voting.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

We need to talk about the Supreme Court.

The Senate Judiciary Committee just jammed through the nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett in a blatantly partisan, one-sided process less than two weeks before a Presidential election.

Let me be clear: I will be voting NO on Judge Barrett's nomination on the Senate Floor.

Protecting Virginians' health care is at the top of my reasons for voting this way. The Supreme Court is set to consider the Trump administration's lawsuit to strike down the Affordable Care Act and its protections for people with pre-existing conditions, with no replacement, just a few weeks after the election. We simply cannot afford a Supreme Court Justice like Judge Barrett, who has openly attacked the ACA's constitutionality. And frankly, I can't think of a worse way to honor the legacy of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg than to replace her on the court with someone so openly hostile to the Constitution's protection of a woman's right to choose.

Justice Ginsburg was someone I respected and admired, and I know she was a role model for many Virginians. It is just shameful to see the future of the seat she held be determined by Donald Trump and Senate Republicans, instead of the American people.

But even if they deprive the American people of their say on this Supreme Court seat, the future of the Supreme Court is still on the ballot on November 3rd. It is absolutely critical that we flip the Senate and send Joe Biden to the White House. So we need to channel the pain and frustration that so many of us are feeling right now into action. That is how we honor Justice Ginsburg's memory and continue to pursue the notions of justice and quality to which she dedicated her life. With just 13 days until Election Day, I ask you to keep up the fight and join me in making our voices heard on November 3rd.

Sincerely, |
---
-- Mark Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Terrorists are losing and peace is breaking out
body:
It’s hard to believe that just five years ago, Americans watched in horror as ISIS gained power and territory in the Middle East...

https://www.whitehouse.gov/1600daily/
The White House • October 22, 2020

** Terrorists are losing and peace is breaking out
------------------------------------------------------------
It’s hard to believe that just five years ago, Americans watched in horror as ISIS gained power and territory in the Middle East and radical Islamist terrorists killed 14 Americans on U.S. soil in San Bernardino, California.

Today, the ISIS caliphate is destroyed. Terrorist leaders Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi and Qasem Soleimani are dead. And instead of sending American troops to fight in endless wars or giving cash to terrorist sponsors in Iran, the United States is securing peace deals with our real allies across the Middle East, including Israel.

“The facts speak for themselves,” foreign policy expert Harry Kazianis writes. “Trump has successfully aligned U.S. national security strategy with our national interests.”

President Trump is the first American leader since Ronald Reagan not to start a war. Instead, he has rebuilt our military, restored American sovereignty, and renewed the “peace through strength” foreign policy that helped our country win the Cold War.

On issue after issue, President Trump has reversed the disastrous foreign policy of the Obama Administration and put the American people FIRST:
* Under President Obama, budget cuts and “sequestration” gutted our U.S. military. President Trump increased funding for national defense (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-rebuilding-military-protecting-americas-interests-abroad/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) and secured the largest pay raise for our troops in a decade.

* The disastrous Obama Iran nuclear deal gave the world’s number 1 state sponsor of terrorism (https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/president-trump-says-iran-deal-defective-core-new-one-will-require-real-commitments/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) over $100 billion to fund violence. President Trump withdrew from the one-sided deal and reinstated tough sanctions on Tehran.

* Instead of funding our adversaries and breaking promises to our allies, President Trump has kept his word, including moving the U.S. Embassy in Israel to Jerusalem (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-keeps-promise-open-u-s-embassy-jerusalem-israel/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) after past presidents of both parties broke their pledges to do so.

* For years, Washington allowed other countries to take advantage of American taxpayers. Under President Trump, between 2016 and 2019, Canada and our European allies added $130 billion to defense budgets (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/remarks-president-trump-nato-secretary-general-stoltenberg-11-meeting-london-united-kingdom/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) to support NATO.

* President Trump has stood up for the people of Cuba, Venezuela, and Nicaragua against corrupt, socialist regimes (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/remarks-president-trump-honoring-bay-pigs-veterans/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) . The Castro dictatorship, for example, will no longer be funded by U.S. dollars like it was under President Obama.

Those changes are just the tip of the iceberg. Before this summer, only two Israel peace deals with its Arab neighbors had been secured over the past 72 years. This year, with support from the Trump Administration, two such historic agreements were announced within one month of each other.

📖 MORE: President Trump secures historic Middle East peace deals (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-promoting-peace-stability-middle-east/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

Here in our own hemisphere, the Trump Administration imposed tough sanctions to pressure the illegitimate “regime” of Venezuelan dictator Nicolas Maduro. President Trump has recognized Juan Guaido as the Interim President of Venezuela, rallying an international coalition of 58 countries in his support.

On trade, President Trump’s United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement replaced the outdated NAFTA, which sent American jobs and manufacturing power overseas.

Perhaps most important among his accomplishments, President Trump reversed Washington’s decades-long, bipartisan refusal to confront China (https://www.foreignaffairs.com/articles/china/2020-10-21/how-china-threatens-american-democracy) . He successfully used tariffs to persuade China to sign an improved Phase One Trade Agreement, took action to protect Americans from unfair competition and intellectual property theft, and prevented malign actors from gaining access to crucial U.S. information networks.

After the Coronavirus spread from China across the globe, President Trump took quick action to reshore critical supply chains (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-ensuring-essential-medical-supplies-produced-united-states/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) , including those for key medicines.

With a stronger America, our adversaries know their options are limited. In North Korea, President Trump’s maximum-pressure campaign brought Chairman Kim Jong Un to the table. In Russia, the Trump Administration’s sanctions punished oligarchs who profited from destabilizing and malicious activities.

President Trump is protecting American sovereignty and standing up for our Constitutional rights, as well. This June, he authorized economic sanctions against International Criminal Court officials directly engaged with any effort to prosecute U.S. soldiers or other personnel (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/statement-press-secretary-129/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) without the consent of the United States.

The American people see these results. According to a Gallup poll conducted this February, Americans are more satisfied with our country’s position in the world today than they have been at any time since 2003. Similarly, a large majority of Americans today think their government is doing a good job keeping them safe from terrorism.

Across the world, terrorists are losing and peace is breaking out. When America is strong, secure, and free, our nation’s future—and our children’s—is that much brighter.

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump depart the White House for Nashville, Tennessee | October 22, 2020
